name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The Story on Stopping Vaccine Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Action 4 Liberty proudly stands for your health freedom. If you don't want to get the vaccine, it is your right to decide what goes in your own body. It's as simple as that. **But the authoritarians don't agree and are doubling down on their tyranny. The Government's FDA sped through an approval of the Pfizer vaccine and now more places are mandating vaccinations.** Health care workers are on the cusp of losing their jobs for not getting the jab. And the rest of us, are going to be segmented from society and treated like second class citizens. In fact, if you and I end up in the hospital for some reason, we may receive less medical care simply for choosing to be unvaccinated. That's insane! Fortunately, there is a growing movement in this state of **people standing up**! **This last weekend, our team traveled to Little Falls, Brainerd, Grand Rapids, Cambridge and the Governor's Mansion to support the Stop the Mandate rallies. We even had some[face-to-face encounters](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_tour_confrontation_with_politician?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=2) with politicians.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_tour_confrontation_with_politician?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=3) People all across Minnesota are rising up and demanding that government and businesses support their health freedom. This has made politicians scared of the people. So they're putting up a fence around the Capitol...again. To keep the people out of the People's House. Unbelievable! To win this important fight for our health freedom and put pressure on politicians at the Capitol, we **need** to have more people on board with us calling on their legislators to sign the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge. Which is exactly our objective at the Minnesota State Fair this week. Thank you to the countless **[volunteers](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=4)** who reached out to be a part of making our booth a huge success! Sadly, politicians across Minnesota are telling their constituents they won't sign the **Stop Vaccine Mandates** pledge. And when asked what their plan is to stop the erosion of our freedoms, they go silent. **We actually[have a plan](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=5)! Don't let these politicians get off the hook. Help us build the largest political movement in Minnesota by putting our message in front of the 2 million Minnesotans who attend the State Fair. Make Action 4 Liberty's booth drown out the propaganda coming from the Tim Walz and the DFL booths.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=6 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=6)
---
We mean business here at Action 4 Liberty. We'll be using the opportunity of the state fair to spread the message of Stopping the Vaccine Mandate.
I'm happy to report that, after the storms passed this morning, we were able to deliver the booth to the fairgrounds. We'll be right across from the Children's Midway, a prime location to spread our message of freedom!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=7)
Our numbers are growing by thousands a day right now. And the state fair gives us the ability to grow even larger. The bigger our numbers, the more political power we yield at the Capitol.
## We can't lose this fight!
Politicians can ignore you and me. But they can't ignore tens of thousands of angry voters, all contacting them about passing the Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates** Amendment. And you can help us find those people right now.
Help my team get the message out to tens of thousands of more Minnesotans by [**donating today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=8).
I know many of you are unable to volunteer at the booth, but a contribution will go along way to helping us pay for the staff and literature so we can reach more Minnesotans.
**Let's stand up to these authoritarians who want to DESTROY our freedoms. Join us by[volunteering](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=9) at the State Fair booth or by donating to [help fund our message to 2 million fair-goers](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=10).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=11).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=12).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=politicians_against_us_mandate&n=13), software for leaders.

name: Neil Shah
subject: FDA Approval or Not, You Must Have the Choice
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fda_approval_or_not&n=1) Peter, I just wanted to drop a quick message to you since you probably saw the news that the Pfizer vaccine received FDA approval yesterday. That's likely going to set off a new round of vaccine mandates. **Let's be perfectly clear - the choice of what goes in your body must be left to you, not your employer, and certainly not government.** Protecting an individual's health freedom is essential if we want to preserve the American experiment. As a son of immigrant parents, I can tell you firsthand that this is the greatest country on earth. So let's not lose it. I just got back from attending the Stop the Mandate rally in Princeton. My campaign will be at many of these events. And I look forward to seeing you and thousands of patriots this Saturday at the Capitol. As the next Governor of Minnesota, I will always stand for your health freedom. But I fear this issue needs to be resolved well before the 2022 election. That's why I call on the legislature to pass the Stop Vaccine Mandates provision in the upcoming Special Session. We need Republicans in the legislature standing up right now, on this important issue. If we get this wrong, we are going to lose so much more. **Please visit Rep Erik Mortensen's draft Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment, which I support.** [**Click here**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fda_approval_or_not&n=2). **** **Thank you!** **** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fda_approval_or_not&n=3) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Republican congressional candidate Lisa Scheller's statement on Susan Wild's vote to green-light a $3.5 trillion partisan, socialist spending spree that will increase taxes and drive up the cost of everyday goods.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
My Statement on Susan Wild's vote to greenlight a $3.5 trillion partisan, socialist spending spree that will increase taxes and drive up the cost of e | |
---

Contact: Pierce Frauenheim
Pierce@SchellerforCongress.com
August 24, 2021

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:

**Lisa Scheller's Statement on Susan Wild's Vote in Favor of Advancing the FY22 Budget Resolution.**

**Allentown, PA** \- Today, Susan Wild voted in favor of a budget drafted by Bernie Sanders. Wild has been a vocal supporter of this vote, being mentioned several times of pleading with other Democrats to pass this resolution. But what Congresswoman Wild fails to recognize is that this budget is a road map to to ruin that paves the way for greater Washington command and control over the lives and livelihoods of millions of working families.

The $3.5 trillion price tag is just a start as this budget increases spending to $68 trillion over the next ten years which will be the largest sustained spending level in U.S. History and if you combine the spending in the budget with what the Democrats have already spent since taking over the U.S. House of Representatives in 2019, it will equal more than the total taxes paid by all Americans in U.S. history.

This budget proposes $16.3 trillion of total deficit spending over ten years, which is a debt increase greater than the GDP of every country on earth, except the U.S., and increases the national debt to $45 Trillion dollars by 2031. The budget also raises the corporate tax rate to a level higher than communist China and includes a multi-trillion tax increase on small businesses and family farms. This spending is irresponsible, reckless, and downright sickening seeing that democrats are pushing it at the same time that inflation is on track to reach its highest level since 1981.

Besides the sheer amount of spending which should be reason enough not to support it, this budget includes amnesty for illegal immigrants, tax breaks and subsidies for wealthy environmentalists, eliminating right to work protections, expanding government-controlled health care, Imposing new taxes and mandates on American energy development that pick winners and losers, raising electricity costs for households, increasing reliance on China and Russia for energy, and new funding to double the size of the IRS.

After voting to move this budget forward, Wild tried to dodge any criticism by stating that her vote "should not be confused for an endorsement" of the final version of the budget. Make no mistake, Susan Wild has led the charge to mortgage the future of this country in order to pursue her socialist wish list of policies and I will make sure the people of Pennsylvania's 7th district know this come election day 2022. Susan Wild was the one that rallied the Democrat caucus to support this bill just yesterday [according to reports ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=402287373b19495a9528d23c3808fb4e&_e=M6eaa26VmP8Zqyqo56Ih_pVr7X-EiIpmcF2eY_G3r93k4FCt_wjLmiLHCIHC9jslDbaSqNzCid_YeqMq41xmSqQO9bOH64VkfesaEQXsvOTqgVRqNnl4oN925FNpF_HYsbi3Mlw8GP76PykrF77YjgyZBbjTvl1_zn9FVRMPN9QEXUVQ0GFuKh4Ii-RlZxkHe6i-6y9qzQLTITef2XJ5CnNZFIIs2EACHLqqauzBxwYUaEgqMCxnaulxdLEw_EQDIcNAQXrM3aIf45fWc6E13mtdflKohL9LwI2sCkBCp8_wyMRaF9jIDujvXJxf3I0B7eJ-LEMR-oVMlODo3Y9Ib5DWL9oiwfOu12wu9DSsI1pOIog-y2IcBkBb8kVnrl6W)and she should be held accountable for her "yes" vote today.

Pennsylvania families deserve to know what their representative stands for and I intend to do just that. I ran for local office because of a tax increase and successfully cut taxes for the people of Lehigh County and I will do the same in Washington. This budget will do immense harm to the future of American families and it must be defeated.

###

For more information on Lisa's campaign, please visit [https://lisaschellerpa.com/.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=402287373b19495a9528d23c3808fb4e&_e=M6eaa26VmP8Zqyqo56Ih_llqOFmFYHjZIeB_JPlVFmas5fjiTuymYyfW4YwqCqZjrjb1A-qEHsnn1QUltrNGX4M5y9GdBqK45J4O8QEORJF7LUX99px3_duxpt4wWTB43ZpzFLrgoJY8GuyWmCo5udJWwltK3m_MpPkO32_BaHazCpXmA8UII8jdtiHpSQnujmA-KCWpmxHwMkaPWbtSCFfay-R17gF4qAg9-bqYgVuL65sfFIZ37X-ECnSfC4yk5sNOY8Frax7M6DXBzZ4ttA%3D%3D)
|
---

body:
After Newsom is defeated, the next step will be flipping the seven swing Congressional seats California is home to in order to restore a GOP majority. After Newsom is defeated, the next step will be flipping the seven swing Congressional seats that California is home to in order to restore a GOP majority. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=340cf099487e4452a22860183fc34764&_e=s__VcHrq_YMgOt6ZCWPa1k-1WWVCBAvJCQB0V8EOWFmRmxqFVPQehYWqd9UpRjvaDyoVTr-iYGbvOf5BatHngCSgiRlBj-Hyhdg82Jx324PBszuDssGvuxc1ZdakK7KJIcYXbLiIkR9ZB6mM0lMsSJj8wLcSMDipuW-ZBinQTCUtfBHHMq_rqWPq3rXUip7rfNBgrAlaFNPVxDeNFq33rXcMbFVxYsE7G2EvI5Sz8zdMHXzHhDe6dzCoIqDz0Bkoolk6E0ycSxzDejbVuImaggqR1j8qufnTReLT7es6N5vOMjMUXEBo1EZhYHlSk0iWf7QERNGiATn81p10n0Q5BMxvGjm9ddW7rZ0j4236c4U6dFcKbRAxTOuaqDHSemOj8yeI6FsXVaVT-ZPRsLgnBHuY0fUHxBFGVKxEiAmmKjpa40FfToCHOMUYbv11tok4sdF1YCijcnuRNlMm1qphZA%3D%3D)
Peter -

Nancy Pelosi just declared that her nephew - California Governor Gavin Newsom - is a _"great governor"_ and that the current recall effort against him is not good for _"children or other living things."_

Is allowing the release of a convicted murderer who buried a developmentally disabled man alive _**GOOD**_ for our children?

Is signing new financial protections into law for PG&E; after the company pleaded guilty to involuntary manslaughter for causing a massive fire in 2018 that killed 84 people _**GOOD**_ for "other living things"?

Is imposing job-killing policies and devastating small businesses during a pandemic _**GOOD**_ in the eyes of Pelosi and other leading Democrats?

**These failures are why Californians are on the verge of recalling Newsom.** And if Nancy Pelosi thinks things these things are good too, [**then that's even more reason to fire her as Speaker.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=340cf099487e4452a22860183fc34764&_e=s__VcHrq_YMgOt6ZCWPa1k-1WWVCBAvJCQB0V8EOWFmRmxqFVPQehYWqd9UpRjvaDyoVTr-iYGbvOf5BatHngCSgiRlBj-Hyhdg82Jx324PBszuDssGvuxc1ZdakK7KJIcYXbLiIkR9ZB6mM0lMsSJj8wLcSMDipuW-ZBinQTCUtfBHHMq_rqWPq3rXUip7rfNBgrAlaFNPVxDeNFq33rXcMbFVxYsE7G2EvI5Sz8zdMHXzHhDe6dzCoIqDz0BkoALkyrUwbBDBRkDC-6cfm91uyy6fDgwt5XQOxN2QMsYnqFapRUgJ8nmgr0-X2qn1e2CGqnMjoH6aILNruO-by_e0mZeJca31rNGJ0jWyF0gY5Fg8d1xjv7_a1LA5WbVQDEaLHbLj5cpj3MfTI-kSy8NOY8B7zjz3LTc4JY4cf-OxrQHIXX3Nhyooi99VKWwnA7prN2wSk8_TuBHg3aDhIOA%3D%3D)

[**FIRE PELOSI**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=340cf099487e4452a22860183fc34764&_e=s__VcHrq_YMgOt6ZCWPa1k-1WWVCBAvJCQB0V8EOWFmRmxqFVPQehYWqd9UpRjvaDyoVTr-iYGbvOf5BatHngCSgiRlBj-Hyhdg82Jx324PBszuDssGvuxc1ZdakK7KJIcYXbLiIkR9ZB6mM0lMsSJj8wLcSMDipuW-ZBinQTCUtfBHHMq_rqWPq3rXUip7rfNBgrAlaFNPVxDeNFq33rXcMbFVxYsE7G2EvI5Sz8zdMHXzHhDe6dzCoIqDz0Bkoi1X6ovqV87eHbwc3x2Oia02cj_kuG1CmIrAhHlDfNR0mgmYqF2f9fM5Idg8qyi8T7oycV8TDRvWv8Zb2fxWtk3DZO5_5hyB8eyjNK2jYStlQoCQHiBzylNRtlNVGkYFOx1NIUDL6ZgFKIW5Z7Av_TFIJAZJvjCsEhMjAEuxmGPm1K9Ll-gHPUx6OjIDyiqUNSPgAkzFrYkKVF_5JeVqPuQ%3D%3D)
**One thing is very clear, Peter - the Democrat swamp will always protect its own.** This type of blind allegiance from the Democrats is destroying our nation from within and as long as they remain in control, it will continue.

By focusing on the seven target Congressional seats that California is home to, we have the opportunity to flip enough seats to take back the House and send Pelosi to the backbench of Congress in this upcoming election, [**but not without your immediate support.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=340cf099487e4452a22860183fc34764&_e=s__VcHrq_YMgOt6ZCWPa1k-1WWVCBAvJCQB0V8EOWFmRmxqFVPQehYWqd9UpRjvaDyoVTr-iYGbvOf5BatHngCSgiRlBj-Hyhdg82Jx324PBszuDssGvuxc1ZdakK7KJIcYXbLiIkR9ZB6mM0lMsSJj8wLcSMDipuW-ZBinQTCUtfBHHMq_rqWPq3rXUip7rfNBgrAlaFNPVxDeNFq33rXcMbFVxYsE7G2EvI5Sz8zdMHXzHhDe6dzCoIqDz0BkoqJY-AchY9m53wwh6A12o_AFLoYcMvkoRY9KoDA2kaQJMfJ9zrmZU20tg3lT5q3k7-Xl8QjSLKyPZydtD8OoNYmbwJpHETNkYgo7SFUHjrPOGy2jSklKdu7KwyrGmYQZvp8_uPbWSRL4kV1ic9THcnZWwFANo9MHOHkvaEGucXSoHtmWHLl3vGGvCdumIVWJAeDb5ncWvo3PgGjaT9hOkyA%3D%3D)

[**Will you pitch in $15, $25 or even $50 immediately so we have the resources needed to flip swing seats in battleground California and win back a Republican majority?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=340cf099487e4452a22860183fc34764&_e=s__VcHrq_YMgOt6ZCWPa1k-1WWVCBAvJCQB0V8EOWFmRmxqFVPQehYWqd9UpRjvaDyoVTr-iYGbvOf5BatHngCSgiRlBj-Hyhdg82Jx324PBszuDssGvuxc1ZdakK7KJIcYXbLiIkR9ZB6mM0lMsSJj8wLcSMDipuW-ZBinQTCUtfBHHMq_rqWPq3rXUip7rfNBgrAlaFNPVxDeNFq33rXcMbFVxYsE7G2EvI5Sz8zdMHXzHhDe6dzCoIqDz0BkoVvthfsPOHBybE2GNFcSV5NauN_VQY1hrWtE6mmi-huylPy6Mv5cmv5M3wMS0sOvlsPRoiPrTZckMAQny28z1QBIMAPlzBPPmVx4vdmMJnqRaTDeFyFHV8nBQAdcypnKcrGjlro7NTZoWve4JQrf6MS7F2LsXAn4KGgqSmP438HqEsYsVnudwswO_IzIV6NmA794rMMEEO1Pu98QfNIfR7Q%3D%3D)

This recall election has shown the vitality and force of the conservative movement in California. The state is already the key to winning back the House, but if we can ride this wave to defeating more Democrats in 2022 a Republican House majority is all but certain.

We cannot let this conservative momentum in the Golden State go to waste. name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I want to thank our brave military personnel and veterans for their service and sacrifices. My thoughts are with every m
Peter,I want to thank our brave military personnel and veterans for their service and sacrifices. My thoughts are with every member of our armed forces--past and present--as we witness the tragedy unfolding in Afghanistan. Those who swore an oath to protect and defend our country from all enemies foreign and domestic do not deserve to have their heroic efforts tarnished by the incompetence of the Biden Administration. President Biden has mishandled the withdrawal and put every American's life there in danger. He has allowed the Taliban to destroy everything that our troops accomplished. I pray for the safety of those who risked their lives, helped our cause, and have now been abandoned by President Biden to suffer under the brutalities of the Taliban. America's troops, our allies, and our country deserve better leadership. Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fhhsud-idtjvlhlh-r/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fhhsud-idtjvlhlh-y/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fhhsud-idtjvlhlh-j/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fhhsud-l-i) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: NewsLink: FBI finds scant evidence U.S. Capitol attack was coordinated-sources
body: Background on reports that their was no January 6 conspiracy [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25663&F=T&] FBI finds scant evidence U.S. Capitol attack was coordinated-sources [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25663&F=T&] Source: Reuters [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25663&F=T&] The FBI has found scant evidence that the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol was the result of an organized plot to overturn the presidential election result, according to four current and former law enforcement officials. Though federal officials have arrested more than 570 alleged participants, the FBI at this point believes the violence was not centrally coordinated by far-right groups or prominent supporters of then-President Donald Trump. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25599&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc2lja25pY2stZG9jdW1lbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjUwNDU0NTY=] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25599&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc2lja25pY2stZG9jdW1lbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjUwNDU0NTY=] [180x150x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25551&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1uZXdzbGluayZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODI1MDQ1NDU2] 2021-08-03 Documents Reveal the DC Chief Medical Examiner Submitted a Request to Cremate Ashli Babbitt Two Days after Gaining Custody of Her Body [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25551&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1uZXdzbGluayZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODI1MDQ1NDU2] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56498&L=25551&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1uZXdzbGluayZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODI1MDQ1NDU2] Judicial Watch received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. These new documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that ‘due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. clean_body: Background on reports that their was no January 6 conspiracy [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [=] FBI finds scant evidence U.S. Capitol attack was coordinated-sources [=] Source: Reuters [=] The FBI has found scant evidence that the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol was the result of an organized plot to overturn the presidential election result, according to four current and former law enforcement officials. Though federal officials have arrested more than 570 alleged participants, the FBI at this point believes the violence was not centrally coordinated by far-right groups or prominent supporters of then-President Donald Trump. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [=] 2021-08-11 JW Obtains Additional Documents on Death Investigation of Capitol Police Officer Sicknick – Show Media Pressured Medical Examiner on Natural Causes Conclusion [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] Judicial Watch eceived an additional 2,440 pages of records related to the death of U.S. Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick which show major media representatives pressuring the Office of the Chief Medical Examiner of the District of Columbia over its conclusion that Officer Sicknick had died of natural causes. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x2] [] 2021-08-03 Documents Reveal the DC Chief Medical Examiner Submitted a Request to Cremate Ashli Babbitt Two Days after Gaining Custody of Her Body [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. These new documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that ‘due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [=] 2021-05-24 Judicial Watch Sues DC for Records On the Capitol Police Shooting Death of Ashli Babbitt in the Capitol on January 6, 2021 [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] “The normal course of action in a police-related shooting is to quickly inform the public of the details – but the lack of transparency in the killing of veteran Ashli Babbitt in the U.S. Capitol is unprecedented and obviously political,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That Judicial Watch must file a lawsuit for basic information after five months of stonewalling is a scandal.” [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [==] [32x32x2] [==] [32x32x3] [==] [32x32x3] [=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [==] |

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Kamala’s recall Hail Mary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Even with Biden's chaos in Afghanistan, VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom and prop him up. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184716:6jULDglaN:m:1:3253819041:96CE81F3EBB977D56BC07481CA04A5D7:r)

---
We have a problem, Peter.

Even with Biden's chaos in Afghanistan, **VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom** and prop him up ahead of the recall election.

Harris holds a significant influence on Democrats in the Bay Area who up until now may have been indifferent about the results of the recall election.

We need your help URGENTLY! [**Can you spare $20, $40, $60 or more to help us ensure that Kamala doesn 't sway the outcome of this election?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184716:6jULDglaN:m:1:3253819041:96CE81F3EBB977D56BC07481CA04A5D7:r)

The good news is, this "Hail Mary" attempt to protect Newsom **shows just how scared they are that they could lose this recall and another puppet Democrat governor.**

First, they enlisted Elizabeth Warren for their advertising campaign, then President Biden endorsed Newsom in a tweet, and now Kamala Harris is actually coming to California to campaign for Newsom!

_**One would think that the Vice President might have better things to be doing given Pres. Biden 's disaster in Afghanistan**_ - but protecting their radical leftist agenda seems to be much more important to them.

They're scrambling to protect their puppet governor and we need your help to make sure their last-ditch efforts don't work.

[**Will you send in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us make sure that we can turn out every California voter possible to cast a ballot to recall Gavin Newsom?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184716:6jULDglaN:m:1:3253819041:96CE81F3EBB977D56BC07481CA04A5D7:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184716:6jULDglaN:m:1:3253819041:96CE81F3EBB977D56BC07481CA04A5D7:r)
Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

P.S. Voting by mail is happening as you're reading this, and every minute that goes by without your support is another missed opportunity to help turn out pro-recall votes. [**Please rush your support now and help us overcome the boost Kamala is trying to give to the Left.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184716:6jULDglaN:m:1:3253819041:96CE81F3EBB977D56BC07481CA04A5D7:r)

| PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM

Geoff Palmer
Saul Fox

| Peter,
Kathy Barnette is in this to win it. Throughout the first few months of this campaign, she has outraised her opponents, been attacked repeatedly by the mainstream media, and traveled more than 700 miles a week to get her message out to the voters all across the commonwealth. As we are sure you know, her efforts have proven that she is the best candidate for the job to represent YOU in Washington. But she can't do it alone.
Kathy has asked that we harness the grassroots energy we see all across the state into volunteer production. That is why we are asking for volunteers to join us at our campaign office starting September 1st to help make phone calls and identify more supporters of Kathy. Kathy wants this to be a grassroots-powered campaign, but we need your help to make that happen.
Click the button below and sign up for shifts. We need folks in our office every day fighting for the future of this country. You can sign up for as many shifts as you can attend. Join us!

clean_body: We can't do this without you | | | | | | | == | | Peter, Kathy Barnette is in this to win it. Throughout the first few months of this campaign, she has outraised her opponents, been attacked repeatedly by the mainstream media, and traveled more than 700 miles a week to get her message out to the voters all across the commonwealth. As we are sure you know, her efforts have proven that she is the best candidate for the job to represent YOU in Washington. But she can't do it alone. Kathy has asked that we harness the grassroots energy we see all across the state into volunteer production. That is why we are asking for volunteers to join us at our campaign office starting September 1st to help make phone calls and identify more supporters of Kathy. Kathy wants this to be a grassroots-powered campaign, but we need your help to make that happen. Click the button below and sign up for shifts. We need folks in our office every day fighting for the future of this country. You can sign up for as many shifts as you can attend. Join us! | | | | == | | | | | | | | Thanks for joining our fight! Kathy Barnette Campaign Team | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. Derek, according to election experts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ , **the Virginia Governor’s race will give us “an early clue as to the political environment in 2022.”**

Here’s why:

Virginia Democrats keep stunning political experts with huge victories, including a thumping of Donald Trump in the 2020 presidential election.

After Trump endorsed Glenn Youngkin 3 separate times, election experts everywhere are watching Virginia to see if Donald Trump has any gas left in the tank.

A Youngkin win would put a rocket booster on Donald Trump’s 2024 presidential hopes.

name: Joe Mantegna
subject: We have a responsibility to honor their valor
body:
Hi Peter, this is Joe Mantegna. You might know me from movies or TV as Joey Zasa in _The_ _Godfather_ , the voice of Fat Tony in _The Simpsons_ , or Special Agent David Rossi in the CBS series _Criminal Minds._ But what you may not know about me is that off-screen, I try to spend time raising awareness and appreciation for those who risked their lives so that we can live in freedom. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) You see, out of the millions of brave men and women who served in World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, only about 6% are still with us today. _Most of the World War II veterans still alive are nearing or past 100 years old ... most of our Korean War veterans are in their 90s... and most of our Vietnam veterans are in their 70s and 80s._ Sadly, with hundreds of these heroes passing away every day, time is short to preserve their first-hand lessons and experiences from which future generations can learn. That's why today, I'm asking fellow patriotic Americans like yourself to help my friends at the American Veterans Center with a special, time-sensitive project -[ **to record the personal stories of our heroic veterans from our World War II generation before it 's too late. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) _You and I understand that freedom is not free and that its price is the blood and sacrifice of generations willing to stand and serve._ **I learned those lessons from my Uncle Willie who served in General Patton 's Third Army in World War II** - _he even earned a Purple Heart for the injuries he sustained in the Battle of the Bulge._ But what I didn't realize until later in life is that the war stories he told me weren't just about him... They were about honoring and remembering his brothers in arms who never made it back home... the ones who never got a chance to re-start their lives like he did. I knew then that whatever I chose to do in life was because of their valor - _and I knew that I had a responsibility to honor that valor._ So, almost fifteen years ago when I met Jim Roberts - President of the American Veterans Center - I was immediately glad to offer any help I could to help honor our veterans and military heroes. You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That's why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these "Oral Histories", they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress' Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you've ever watched one of AVC's Oral Histories, you'll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include:
* **The 442nd Regimental Combat Team** - Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts.
* **The Ritchie Boys** - A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler.
* **Royce Williams** - The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight.
* **Rosie the Riveters** - The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines.

These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it's too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History - from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America's greatest heroes. [**So, will you help my friends at the AVC record the Oral Histories of as many living WWII veterans as possible with a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it's going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. [**That 's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting the AVC Oral History Project with a tax-deductible gift of $15, $35, $50 or more today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) If you can give more - such as $75, $100, or even $500 - that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. _ _ Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer [**SUPPORT THE AVC**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184861:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184863:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184864:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184865:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r)
---|---|---
(C) American Veterans Center | [www.americanveteranscenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58184866:JT7M3glJN:m:1:3253819041:C46EA0FD1179037CB350B83EC0D7327F:r)
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That's why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these "Oral Histories", they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress' Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you've ever watched one of AVC's Oral Histories, you'll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include: The 442nd Regimental Combat Team - Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts. The Ritchie Boys - A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler. Royce Williams - The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight. Rosie the Riveters - The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines. These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it's too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History - from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America's greatest heroes. Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it's going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. If you can give more - such as $75, $100, or even $500 - that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | ---|---|--- (C) American Veterans Center | 1100 N. | | Peter, California Gov. Gavin Newsom attended a get-out-the-vote rally recently where he made the case for why his upcoming election would be essential for a Democratic majority in 2022, saying, “Don't think for a second this isn't also about 2022 and being able to hold the House. The consequences are profound.” And he's right: A Republican victory in this election would ENERGIZE the Republican base like never before. Newsome followed up by saying, “A ‘no' vote would be heard loud and clear, not only across this state, but across the country.” Veteran Democratic strategist Garry South agrees about the importance of Newsom's recall election: “Other than the Virginia governor's race, this is the most important thing going on in the United States.'' Even the White House is becoming more invested, saying that they are in the process of trading schedules to see when President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris would be available to join the campaign trail. If Newsom loses this election, it will be felt FAR beyond California \-- and put the progressive agenda at risk for decades to come. We're fighting full force to make sure Democrats win this recall election and are in a good position heading into the midterm elections. name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teacher RESIGNS over CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
School boards around the country are losing their minds.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58187848:JNcoPgl-N:m:1:3253819041:C451C9679E4FF5DE5639148062BB3B8B:r)
---
Peter,

What happens when a teacher stands up to Critical Race Theory?

_She's forced out of her job by power-hungry monsters._

**Laura Morris, an elementary teacher in Loudoun County, Virginia, had this to say when she tearfully resigned at a school board meeting:_" I'm a Christian woman, and they've said they don't want us here. I've found employment elsewhere."_**

If we don't start standing WITH teachers like her and standing AGAINST Critical Race Theory propagandists, we'll lose ALL the good teachers.

_We stand with Laura Morris and other teachers across the country who are bravely standing up to Critical Race Theory._ **_Do YOU?_**

**[DONATE HERE to help us FIGHT BACK against teachers' unions and school boards that are FORCING Critical Race Theory on teachers AND students. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58187848:JNcoPgl-N:m:1:3253819041:C451C9679E4FF5DE5639148062BB3B8B:r)**

**If the Left indoctrinates our children today, we'll lose America tomorrow.**

The power-hungry unions and radical school board members do not represent us. They are ENEMIES of free thought, objective truth, and the American ideal that all men are created EQUAL.

These failures were elected by We The People - and We The People will REMOVE them.

We need your help, Peter. We need to show these hero teachers who have put their livelihoods on the line for our children that they're not alone. **_WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK._**

**_[Please DONATE NOW to help us stand up to these Critical Race Theory propagandists in the school board and teachers' unions. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58187848:JNcoPgl-N:m:1:3253819041:C451C9679E4FF5DE5639148062BB3B8B:r)_**

Friend,

President Biden's spending plan is out of control. He wants to spend more than $6 TRILLION of your hard-earned money, with no plan to pay for it!

I will continue to fight against this unnecessary and wasteful government spending, but I need your help.

Across the country, inflation is running rampant and prices are soaring. American families are suffering enough and the last thing we need to do is increase taxes and add trillions of dollars to the already sky-high national debt.

Yet Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are rubberstamping every Biden proposal, no matter how high the price tag.
Stop the Big Spending (https://secure.winred.com/turner/stop-big-government-spending?exitintent=true)

Join me in saying ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Congress should be protecting your tax dollars from this unnecessary and out of control spending!

Let’s send a message to Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi: Americans are FED UP with their extravagant spending.

Show your support for Team Turner by chipping in to send a strong, fiscal conservative back to Washington.
I Support Mike! (https://secure.winred.com/turner/stop-big-government-spending?exitintent=true)

Can I count on your support?

Thank you,

Congressman Michael R. Turner

body:

body:

| | Friend, I wanted to follow up on Ruth's email. The historic increase we were able to achieve is a perfect example of just how important it is to protect and defend our House DFL Majority. Will you consider making a donation today so that we can continue our work to ensure every Minnesota child receives a great education and so much more? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9zb3T25EfWU6gcSIP8tHc8ILpoRnCWyPCpg4TrbZB7k=/gNS2HQCCOr2zqO6_LkdsmlicwFp6ECJrh2pAP-eVJnE=?refcode=082521) FYI: Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a full refund from the state. I hope you all enjoy these final days of summer and best of luck if you are preparing for back-to-school. Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Ruth Richardson <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Tues, Aug 24, 2021 at 3:05 PM Subject: Investing in our schools Friend, The start of the school year is just around the corner and with the rise of the Delta variant, it is likely to continue looking different for students across the state. One other reason school will seem somewhat different this year is because House DFLers were able to secure an historic increase in school funding last legislative session. If Republicans in the Senate had remained unchecked they would've cut funding to our schools and shifted resources from our public schools to private schools. Instead, we secured the largest increase in school funding in more than 15 years. This was a great first step, but there is much more we need to do to make up for underinvestments over the last decade. That's why we need to protect and expand our majority in the Minnesota House. [Can you help us out by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9zb3T25EfWU6gcSIP8tHc8ILpoRnCWyPCpg4TrbZB7k=/gNS2HQCCOr2zqO6_LkdsmlicwFp6ECJrh2pAP-eVJnE=?refcode=082521) Thank you for your continued support. Together we can keep building on our progress for years to come. Thank you, Rep. Ruth Richardson 52B - Mendota Heights, Inver Grove Heights, Eagan, Sunfish Lake Chair, Minnesota House Education Policy Committee
P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. [If you are a Minnesota resident, make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9zb3T25EfWU6gcSIP8tHc8ILpoRnCWyPCpg4TrbZB7k=/gNS2HQCCOr2zqO6_LkdsmlicwFp6ECJrh2pAP-eVJnE=?refcode=082521) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9zb3T25EfWU6gcSIP8tHc8ILpoRnCWyPCpg4TrbZB7k=/gNS2HQCCOr2zqO6_LkdsmlicwFp6ECJrh2pAP-eVJnE=?refcode=082521)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS BILL EDWARDS' RADIO SHOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, AUG. 25, 2021
ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS BILL EDWARDS' RADIO SHOW
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined radio show host Bill Edwards on his WTKS Savannah morning show today to discuss Greater Georgia's mission to register and engage more voters, fight for conservative values, and defend election integrity. She also talked about her efforts to hold Big Tech and elected officials accountable, as well as her work to include and mobilize new volunteers to stop America's rush toward socialism.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MxkawGloycuX9x0RBQbNOHF8oJSk_EcHveZLzVh-4chdZmkX4d70_o5rM9AGSNL55ItPbxG30FIDQ8qxFQsDuVRDcGAQEkZni4kbsQohPSN0ygg74He4VgMm9xr8H1fzopz2gWamjFzEqa-MvGpHLw==&c=O8PJlpaGBuwPGXPPPvXH2OJeB81VSGVRtL5KsyX-Gr1q-6NifZRVDA==&ch=_XY0o50UU9VWEeZlmSNN_CKM0BO7sNnzzsB7vK66r0VqS_UbzIbOtw==) or the photo below to listen to the full interview:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MxkawGloycuX9x0RBQbNOHF8oJSk_EcHveZLzVh-4chdZmkX4d70_o5rM9AGSNL55ItPbxG30FIDQ8qxFQsDuVRDcGAQEkZni4kbsQohPSN0ygg74He4VgMm9xr8H1fzopz2gWamjFzEqa-MvGpHLw==&c=O8PJlpaGBuwPGXPPPvXH2OJeB81VSGVRtL5KsyX-Gr1q-6NifZRVDA==&ch=_XY0o50UU9VWEeZlmSNN_CKM0BO7sNnzzsB7vK66r0VqS_UbzIbOtw==)
---
| As Kelly said:
"I've been spending the last six months ... making sure that we stay mobilized as conservatives. After an election is not the time to take the tent down; it's the time to grow the tent. And that's what I've been working on doing with Greater Georgia, which is an organization that I started ... Georgia is the battleground heading into 2022 and 2024, and we're going to show the country and the world that this is a red state.
"I'm focused on making sure that our elections are fair and trusted and that we get our folks back out to vote because we know that, on Jan. 5, about 339,000 Republicans stayed home ... And S.B. 202 goes a very long way, but we've got to make sure it's implemented properly ... Stacey Abrams spent $7 million in the courts before our elections. We have to do the same, and we have to make sure that we're fighting for election integrity every single day - not just in an election year.
"We're rapidly speeding toward socialism ... we have got to stop that, and that's what this next election is about, and that's why I'm working hard to register more conservatives. We know that there's hundreds of thousands of conservatives that can still be registered ... that just don't vote, and then we know that there's disenfranchised conservatives, and those are the three groups that I'm focused on.
"There are legitimate concerns [about the 2020 election], and we need to get to the bottom of it. I've asked our elections officials to please speed up the investigations ... I've actually filed open-records requests ... regarding the involvement of Big Tech in our elections. We know they poured $50 million into Georgia - why? What did they do? How was the money used? Georgians deserve answers on that, so we're going to keep fighting.
"I applaud the General Assembly members who have called for a performance review of Fulton County [elections]. That's way overdue, and I applaud them for taking that step and making sure that ... all Georgia residents understand what happened...
"I'm so excited to see new people coming out, putting themselves forward saying, 'I want to help, I want to register, I want to write postcards, I want my voice to be heard,' because we're not going to be canceled, we're not going to be shamed for our conservative values. In fact, we're proud to fight for American values, and we're going to keep doing that."
---
| ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)
---
| | |
---

In fact, we're proud to fight for American values, and we're going to keep doing that." | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Team Mondaire
subject: the key to defeating our primary challenger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

We’re getting closer and closer to the end of the quarter every day — and when we hit the fourth quarter of 2021, we’re going to have to start seriously preparing for the possibility that Mondaire will have a primary challenge.
Raising money to prepare for this possibility early is important for two reasons:
1. Posting strong fundraising numbers will show everyone the strength of our movement, and could dissuade potential corporate-backed opponents from jumping into this race — but even if they do:
2. We’ll have the funds needed to go up against anyone who challenges Mondaire and win.

But the truth is that we won’t be able to do that if we don’t see a huge uptick in our fundraising in the coming weeks. We also know, since New York is poised to lose a seat in redistricting, Mondaire’s district will look different. So, please:
**If you can, pitch in $3, or any amount you can afford, to set our team up for success as we get closer and closer to our primary election. You can use the link below to contribute:**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34636569/302583460/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyYzQyNS1iNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PpMONnMY4dZuMv8Y6xib_A6i6QBnI9iveIU0qIF2vA=)

| | Folks, Last night, House Democrats passed the highly anticipated John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act -- Elaine was so proud to vote for this historic piece of legislation. This bill takes important measures to defend our democracy and the right to vote. It will require states with a history of racial discrimination to receive approval from the federal government before making changes to their election laws, and it will block states from implementing certain voting restrictions. But, this bill will face an uphill battle in the Senate. You can help. [**Elaine is calling on you to join her in the fight to protect our voting rights by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act TODAY >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34636570/302583463/-262607071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyYzQyNS1iNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PpMONnMY4dZuMv8Y6xib_A6i6QBnI9iveIU0qIF2vA=&emci=47025bf1-1704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7182c425-b505-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=7932963) | | | [Become a Co-Sponsor »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34636572/302583467/-262607071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyYzQyNS1iNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PpMONnMY4dZuMv8Y6xib_A6i6QBnI9iveIU0qIF2vA=&emci=47025bf1-1704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7182c425-b505-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=7932963)
---
We’ve seen an unprecedented attack on voting rights since the 2020 election. At least 250 new laws have been proposed in 43 states to enact measures such as restricting early and mail-in voting, closing polling places, and making it harder for folks to vote on Election Day.
Republican state legislators and members of Congress are doing all they can to suppress the right to vote -- they know that when more people vote, _they lose._
**This is Democrats’ last chance to bolster federal voting rights mandates before the year is over.**
With Republicans favored to win the House in 2022, there’s no time to lose. [**Sign on today: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34636574/302583469/-262607071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyYzQyNS1iNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PpMONnMY4dZuMv8Y6xib_A6i6QBnI9iveIU0qIF2vA=&emci=47025bf1-1704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7182c425-b505-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=7932963)
| | [Sign On »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34636576/302583471/-262607071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTgyYzQyNS1iNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PpMONnMY4dZuMv8Y6xib_A6i6QBnI9iveIU0qIF2vA=&emci=47025bf1-1704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7182c425-b505-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=7932963)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Last night, House Democrats passed the highly anticipated John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act -- Elaine was so proud to vote for this historic piece of legislation. This bill takes important measures to defend our democracy and the right to vote. It will require states with a history of racial discrimination to receive approval from the federal government before making changes to their election laws, and it will block states from implementing certain voting restrictions. But, this bill will face an uphill battle in the Senate. You can help. | | | We’ve seen an unprecedented attack on voting rights since the 2020 election. At least 250 new laws have been proposed in 43 states to enact measures such as restricting early and mail-in voting, closing polling places, and making it harder for folks to vote on Election Day. Republican state legislators and members of Congress are doing all they can to suppress the right to vote -- they know that when more people vote, they lose. This is Democrats’ last chance to bolster federal voting rights mandates before the year is over. With Republicans favored to win the House in 2022, there’s no time to lose. | | \--Team Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Keep public lands in public hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Peter, if there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for our beautiful state and deep appreciation for our natural resources.

Growing up, my parents taught me the importance of our treasured outdoor spaces. Every summer, we would pack up the camper to see the beauty our Great Lakes, public lands, and forests had to offer in Wisconsin and across the country. **I'd love to share some old family photos with you at the end of this email, but real quick, here's one from the Grand Canyon:**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34638830/302592559/1510698800?gpsid=50_130_20096&ms=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWYzNTY1Mi1iOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6-Bk16Oq5d0ck8eB-fTBd6_w9fnynJCAcKx1KERpy4=&emci=31eba06d-39f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7af35652-b905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=18659593)
From the Great Lakes to the Grand Canyon, I will always fight to preserve our natural resources, protect our environment, and expand access to public lands. That’s what I’ve done as state treasurer -- and one of my first acts was to lift a Republican gag order preventing us from even talking about climate change!

As the Chair of the Board of Commissioners of Public Lands, I've managed 77,000 acres of public lands across our great state and over $1.2 billion in state trust funds -- making smart investments in renewable energy projects to protect the natural beauty of Wisconsin. Most recently, we transferred a key part of the St. Croix National Scenic Riverway along the Namekagon River to the National Park Service to preserve it.

One of the important things that the U.S. Senate does is to help make sure our national parks are protected and funded. But Ron Johnson doesn't care about any of that. He's too busy denying science and calling climate change "bulls---" to notice that our water levels are rising, our storms are getting more intense, and the carbon in our atmosphere keeps growing.

That's why I'm running to replace him, and as senator, I'll work hard to preserve our natural resources and ensure public lands stay in public hands -- because I want folks to enjoy Wisconsin's great outdoors for generations to come, just like I have.

**[If you think Ron Johnson's got it wrong, will you stand with me in the fight to protect our public lands? Add your name if you believe in science and think we need to take strong action to tackle climate change and protect our natural resources.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34638831/302592560/1510698800?gpsid=50_130_20096&ms=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWYzNTY1Mi1iOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6-Bk16Oq5d0ck8eB-fTBd6_w9fnynJCAcKx1KERpy4=&emci=31eba06d-39f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7af35652-b905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=18659593)**

Thank you, as always, for taking action.

\-- Sarah
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34638832/302592581/1510698800?gpsid=50_130_20096&ms=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_Outdrs_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWYzNTY1Mi1iOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6-Bk16Oq5d0ck8eB-fTBd6_w9fnynJCAcKx1KERpy4=&emci=31eba06d-39f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7af35652-b905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=18659593)

clean_body: Peter, if there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for our beautiful state and deep appreciation for our natural resources. Growing up, my parents taught me the importance of our treasured outdoor spaces. Every summer, we would pack up the camper to see the beauty our Great Lakes, public lands, and forests had to offer in Wisconsin and across the country. I'd love to share some old family photos with you at the end of this email, but real quick, here's one from the Grand Canyon: From the Great Lakes to the Grand Canyon, I will always fight to preserve our natural resources, protect our environment, and expand access to public lands. That’s what I’ve done as state treasurer -- and one of my first acts was to lift a Republican gag order preventing us from even talking about climate change! As the Chair of the Board of Commissioners of Public Lands, I've managed 77,000 acres of public lands across our great state and over $1.2 billion in state trust funds -- making smart investments in renewable energy projects to protect the natural beauty of Wisconsin. Most recently, we transferred a key part of the St. Croix National Scenic Riverway along the Namekagon River to the National Park Service to preserve it. One of the important things that the U.S. Senate does is to help make sure our national parks are protected and funded. But Ron Johnson doesn't care about any of that. He's too busy denying science and calling climate change "bulls---" to notice that our water levels are rising, our storms are getting more intense, and the carbon in our atmosphere keeps growing. That's why I'm running to replace him, and as senator, I'll work hard to preserve our natural resources and ensure public lands stay in public hands -- because I want folks to enjoy Wisconsin's great outdoors for generations to come, just like I have. Thank you, as always, for taking action. \-- Sarah | P.S. As promised, here are some more photos I think you'll enjoy... Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

body:
Your contribution is critical to reaching our goal of 1,000 more donations by next Tuesday.
#

$3, folks.
If you knew pitching in just $3 would guarantee we replaced Pat Toomey in the Senate with a working-class Democrat you could be proud of, wouldn’t it be worth it?
If you knew $3 would send Malcolm to the Senate to fight for our democracy and be a champion for working families, wouldn't you make that donation right away?
We know that $3 doesn't sound like much to win the most important Senate race of 2022, flip this seat, and expand our Democratic majority — but it's more than enough.
Because by the time you get this far in the email, someone else has already chipped in their $3 to fuel our movement. And now we're hoping you'll do the same.
**That's how we'll win this race — together. So what do you say?**
[Can you make a $3 contribution to Malcolm's campaign for U.S. Senate before our August fundraising deadline ends? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34641815/302605954/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY3OGViNy1jMTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQTC4C0s3pcwDvxbfAl6Qx8XgX6sSYFy_8AAG1P93hQ=&emci=9de3fad0-b605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=92678eb7-c105-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=12898431)

Hi friend,
I wanted to follow up on the email my team sent out a couple days ago. Pollinators help plants grow food, contribute to a healthy ecosystem, and keep our economy buzzing!

If you agree with me that pollinators need protecting, I hope you'll add your name as a [**Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Saving America's Pollinators Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34641817/302605956/1928346509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY3OGViNy1jMTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQTC4C0s3pcwDvxbfAl6Qx8XgX6sSYFy_8AAG1P93hQ=&emci=9de3fad0-b605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=92678eb7-c105-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=12898431)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34641820/302605958/1928346509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY3OGViNy1jMTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQTC4C0s3pcwDvxbfAl6Qx8XgX6sSYFy_8AAG1P93hQ=&emci=9de3fad0-b605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=92678eb7-c105-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=12898431)
---
As my team mentioned before, one out of every three bites of food we eat comes from a crop pollinated by bees. That means protecting pollinators isn't just good for the planet, it's good for our country's food chain, as well!

If you haven't already, please **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34641825/302605960/-769290207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjY3OGViNy1jMTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQTC4C0s3pcwDvxbfAl6Qx8XgX6sSYFy_8AAG1P93hQ=&emci=9de3fad0-b605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=92678eb7-c105-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=12898431)** of this critical bill, and tell Congress you agree with the scientists trying to protect these important pollinators.

Thank you,
Kirsten
---

clean_body: Add your name to show that you support the scientists working to protect our planet's pollinators. Hi friend, I wanted to follow up on the email my team sent out a couple days ago. Pollinators help plants grow food, contribute to a healthy ecosystem, and keep our economy buzzing! If you agree with me that pollinators need protecting, I hope you'll add your name as a As my team mentioned before, one out of every three bites of food we eat comes from a crop pollinated by bees. That means protecting pollinators isn't just good for the planet, it's good for our country's food chain, as well! If you haven't already, please of this critical bill, and tell Congress you agree with the scientists trying to protect these important pollinators. subject: Add your name: Congress must act on climate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34643707/302612828/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210825_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA1YTA4YS1jNjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lLR4_6-Jl65kiNfWLOd7s2vY3qv5dxy4-Bu_PRO6x0=&emci=9805a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=9c05a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, We need to act on climate — _fast_. A recent United Nations report made it clearer than ever: we can only avoid the most catastrophic effects of climate change if we drastically cut greenhouse emissions. The UN Secretary General called the report a “code red for humanity.” But we have an important opportunity to take action in the coming weeks as Congress writes the $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. Martin worked hard to make sure critical climate measures were included in the budget reconciliation framework — like establishing a clean electricity standard for utility companies and an electrification and efficiency rebates program for household appliances. These measures would help address our climate crisis with the effect and urgency it deserves, while also investing billions in renewable energy and creating good-paying jobs in New Mexico and across the country. It’s crucial for our economy and our planet that we make these policies a reality. [**So, will you add your name next to Martin’s to call on Congress to pass these critical climate measures?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34643708/302612829/-1795010710?refcode=MTH_em_20210825_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA1YTA4YS1jNjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lLR4_6-Jl65kiNfWLOd7s2vY3qv5dxy4-Bu_PRO6x0=&emci=9805a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=9c05a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34643709/302612830/-1795010710?refcode=MTH_em_20210825_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA1YTA4YS1jNjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lLR4_6-Jl65kiNfWLOd7s2vY3qv5dxy4-Bu_PRO6x0=&emci=9805a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=9c05a08a-c605-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=252045)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Trump's guy is favored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
This is bad
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34643711/302612860/-2023814932?refcode=20210825.5_MW_8DK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjViZDhlNy1jNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHa29D3qL8IaD_IODwLBhlKmOFL1rZcpuEMQ_TEF3kg=)

| | Derek, this might be shocking to hear, but **the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election.**

I’ll tell you why, but first, [**_will you rush a contribution to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign so we can counter Glenn Youngkin’s historical advantage in this race?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34643712/302612861/1097049879?refcode=20210825.5_MW_8DK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjViZDhlNy1jNTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHa29D3qL8IaD_IODwLBhlKmOFL1rZcpuEMQ_TEF3kg=)

Here’s the deal. For decades now, Virginia voters have rebuked the sitting president by electing someone from the opposing party to be their Governor. Case in point, when I was elected Governor, it was right after George W. Bush won the Presidency.

Since Joe Biden won last year, _**Glenn Youngkin is favored to win this year.**_

But here’s the good news. The one time Virginia bucked that trend was in 2012, _when Terry McAuliffe was elected for the first time._

It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to pull this off again, but with your help, I think we can do it.

[**_Believe me when I say this, Derek: Virginia is not a safe blue state. clean_body: This is bad | | | = | | Derek, this might be shocking to hear, but the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election. I’ll tell you why, but first, = Here’s the deal. For decades now, Virginia voters have rebuked the sitting president by electing someone from the opposing party to be their Governor. Case in point, when I was elected Governor, it was right after George W. Bush won the Presidency. Since Joe Biden won last year, Glenn Youngkin is favored to win this year. But here’s the good news. The one time Virginia bucked that trend was in 2012, when Terry McAuliffe was elected for the first time. It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to pull this off again, but with your help, I think we can do it. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being part of history, Mark Warner = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Herschel Walker
subject: [WATCH] personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189450:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189451:JJ9v9gl5N:m:1:3253819041:C161C2E5DF433A1EA82F01C2D06D87A9:r)
