name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Republicans are already attacking us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Running for Senate requires a big leap of faith.
#

I’m reaching out to ask you to make a donation to our campaign, but before I ask, will you allow me to explain why your support is so important?
When I decided to run for Senate, I knew this would be a tough race. We were likely to face attacks and Republican vitriol, and pundits would have a lot to say about whether an African American woman could win this race.
But we desperately need a voice for the people of North Carolina in Washington — not someone who will cater to corporations or special interests.
And at a moment when there are no African American women in the Senate, representation matters more than ever. We know we get better policy outcomes when the people writing our laws reflect the diversity of America.
And the truth is, the baseless attacks from Pat McCrory and Ted Budd have already started. It seems like they’re throwing a new false smear every day, so I need your help to fight back and make sure voters know the truth.
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us turn North Carolina and fight for progress on the most important issues? The only way we can win is if we do this together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34647306/302625730/-928165870?refcode2=39b2e735-d005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&refcode=em210825-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWIyZTczNS1kMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h14cGRV7tV72748onz73V_g7jClVK9R-6ie3qIZt8DU=)**
Running for Senate required a big leap of faith — faith in myself and faith that enough people like you would step up to support us.
We have a real opportunity to not just make history but to deliver meaningful change for North Carolina’s families.
But no person can win a competitive race like this alone, so my hope is you can step up to support our fight today.
**[Please make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign to flip North Carolina. Each donation sends a powerful message that you believe in North Carolina and that together we can win real progress for all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34647307/302625732/-928165870?refcode2=39b2e735-d005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&refcode=em210825-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWIyZTczNS1kMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h14cGRV7tV72748onz73V_g7jClVK9R-6ie3qIZt8DU=)**
Thank you for taking the leap of faith with us. If we do this together, I know that we can overcome any challenges Republicans throw our way.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34647308/302625733/-928165870?refcode2=39b2e735-d005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&refcode=em210825-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWIyZTczNS1kMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h14cGRV7tV72748onz73V_g7jClVK9R-6ie3qIZt8DU=)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: COVID Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 25TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189473:J8SJXglNK:m:1:3253819041:340D3A90B05080CB80B6EE8A2F983DAB:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 25TH One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate. Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know - Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-42942659467-echo7-BDD701DCAEDCD8220C134BF5209773F2@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Mayor John Cranley
subject: Bigger than us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time for real criminal justice reform. | Friend - **Some things are bigger than us.** I believe that’s how we lead a meaningful life - by working for something bigger than us. That means trying to right wrongs, wherever we find them. It means giving a voice to the voiceless. **That’s why I co-founded the Ohio Innocence Project.** The goal of the Ohio Innocence Project is simple: to free every person in Ohio who has been convicted of a crime that they didn’t commit. Since 2003, the Ohio Innocence Project has helped free 33 wrongfully convicted Ohioans, who collectively served nearly 650 years behind bars. **_[Friend, I want to continue this work as Governor. Sign on now to support my plan for real criminal justice reform>>>](https://act.johncranley.com/a/criminal-justice-reform?contactdata=IIK7chVHOcbtSJ53NYRnYVlkkmCui78Ab3jk%2FSCkYxPtg5%2BksvQetarGsFZbIZTWFmiNy7k27TVlnPwKvCOj%2BuJoJmFwM7VO92jE6UW3X75WhAgSZZnPct3k9SklQkVlpoJwYOAGBsACPEw7YWZVZQ%3D%3D)_** **Criminal justice reform is one of my top priorities.** Ohio needs a system that is truly fair and offers equal protection under the law. My plan focuses on addressing poverty and mental illnesses, establishes a special office to investigate wrongful convictions, reform prosecution practices that lead to wrongful convictions, help police departments obtain body cameras and increase police accountability, and invest in jobs, housing, and services for returning citizens. And last but not least, it’s time for Ohio to legalize marijuana. **_[Add your name to support my plan for criminal justice reform>>>](https://act.johncranley.com/a/criminal-justice-reform?contactdata=IIK7chVHOcbtSJ53NYRnYVlkkmCui78Ab3jk%2FSCkYxPtg5%2BksvQetarGsFZbIZTWFmiNy7k27TVlnPwKvCOj%2BuJoJmFwM7VO92jE6UW3X75WhAgSZZnPct3k9SklQkVlpoJwYOAGBsACPEw7YWZVZQ%3D%3D)_** Thank you for standing with me. Mayor John Cranley **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34647891/302627524/-1406512299?refcode=em_JC_PET_InnocenceProject_082521_endbutton&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjQ1OGE3Yy1kMjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4iOI3utfwsFlFizOChWGhSqdcdA-GObxQsHbKLh2PA=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34647892/302627525/-1406512299?refcode=em_jc_fr_footer_link&refcode2=bb458a7c-d205-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjQ1OGE3Yy1kMjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4iOI3utfwsFlFizOChWGhSqdcdA-GObxQsHbKLh2PA=)

name: Bruno Amato
subject: Over ten years of broken promises
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
There's no good explanation for why we do not have another VA clinic in the Central Valley. | | |
---
In 2009, Kevin McCarthy promised to help build a new VA clinic in the Central Valley. This was the year Barack Obama was sworn into office for the first time, folks. In 2021, we still don’t have a new VA clinic. In 2021, veterans in the Central Valley hoping to receive care from a VA clinic have to travel over two hours away to the nearest one in Los Angeles if the other one is full. What do you do if you’re immobile, what do you do if you can’t afford the time or the money for that trip, what do you do if you need emergency medical help? Because of Kevin McCarthy, there's no easy answer to that question. We cannot wait on him any longer. [ We’re coming up on our end-of-month deadline and we need to show McCarthy what he is up against. **As a veteran and a resident of this community, I find it especially disgraceful that Kevin McCarthy says he cares about veterans while prolonging the construction of a crucial VA facility for over a decade.** If elected to Congress, you can bet one of my biggest priorities is to make sure we get that new VA clinic, folks. Our veterans put their lives on the line to protect and serve this country and it’s time we served them. As you may already know, I never wanted to be a politician, folks. But when you see guys like McCarthy lying to people every day, it starts to piss you off. He spends so much time lying to people because he wants to hide the fact that he isn’t doing shit for the working class people. **We have no new VA clinic and we have no answers for why it’s taken so damn long to even get one.** This community deserves somebody who actually cares. clean_body: There's no good explanation for why we do not have another VA clinic in the Central Valley. | | | In 2009, Kevin McCarthy promised to help build a new VA clinic in the Central Valley. This was the year Barack Obama was sworn into office for the first time, folks. In 2021, we still don’t have a new VA clinic. In 2021, veterans in the Central Valley hoping to receive care from a VA clinic have to travel over two hours away to the nearest one in Los Angeles if the other one is full. What do you do if you’re immobile, what do you do if you can’t afford the time or the money for that trip, what do you do if you need emergency medical help? Because of Kevin McCarthy, there's no easy answer to that question. We cannot wait on him any longer. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately As a veteran and a resident of this community, I find it especially disgraceful that Kevin McCarthy says he cares about veterans while prolonging the construction of a crucial VA facility for over a decade. If elected to Congress, you can bet one of my biggest priorities is to make sure we get that new VA clinic, folks. Our veterans put their lives on the line to protect and serve this country and it’s time we served them. As you may already know, I never wanted to be a politician, folks. But when you see guys like McCarthy lying to people every day, it starts to piss you off. He spends so much time lying to people because he wants to hide the fact that he isn’t doing shit for the working class people. We have no new VA clinic and we have no answers for why it’s taken so damn long to even get one. This community deserves somebody who actually cares. People are ready for change, folks. Thank you for your support, folks. I will always be here to serve our community with the commitment all of us deserve. In solidarity, Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

This team really stepped up -- we're proud to announce that more than 300 calls and emails were sent to Rep. Scott Perry and Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy. This team really stepped up -- we're proud to announce that **more than 300 calls and emails were sent to Rep. Scott Perry and Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy.**

This is a huge accomplishment. Together, we're showing the Treason Caucus that the American people are demanding better from their elected officials.

body:
Open to find out how I p*ssed them off | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25c3615c1a8e4274b21a099aa09a943a&_e=c-onIjiLm-Qw5ysFPYhAcKf8urbPFGYMztvSDi_UfY4Y-XRpYT3rX2bA4yooEbIAZogAftw2SydHjGaQ-F713_Td_uyvBtkqzfHyGaYFfJOno06D5gn26ePpZ4Kq56bgZD9g09L1aL5rbj55jxRvNBJaQB3Y-IwMrzbucUZB12CSh1B3ulCgGiFMv3KPUxITom_MrFfODIboHUcVub2gc3HAMHN8z3jBU_AMokPOwCTcx4K4cYCSMdt7jqRyh1L7I0UZl7wc1h4_X_VL1W8eL_32RdD3WGmYx8ZSMpwCmP3zW6iwpwpE0I37T0OQG2y0SIjIE58yf6HG1lrWd68y-vAJ994pKqpb-ELQyqHOLo626g8mKI5TAh57V6Icl5IZFvkhKrzZMTmx7g8t03afEpWZFns26BlGaeamY0b299vAPiCNSoyL0nuABuxn67jY)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Over the past few weeks, I've been attending school board meetings across Arizona. In every meeting, I hear from a small, but vocal, group of people demanding that the schools teach kids that America is fundamentally racist and irredeemably evil. I was appalled by what I’ve heard, so I sounded the alarm.

**I went on Tucker Carlson and publicly called critical race theory it what it is: Racism.**

## ⬇️ WATCH MY INTERVIEW NOW ⬇️
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25c3615c1a8e4274b21a099aa09a943a&_e=c-onIjiLm-Qw5ysFPYhAcKf8urbPFGYMztvSDi_UfY4Y-XRpYT3rX2bA4yooEbIAZogAftw2SydHjGaQ-F713_Td_uyvBtkqzfHyGaYFfJOno06D5gn26ePpZ4Kq56bgZD9g09L1aL5rbj55jxRvNBJaQB3Y-IwMrzbucUZB12CSh1B3ulCgGiFMv3KPUxITom_MrFfODIboHUcVub2gc3HAMHN8z3jBU_AMokPOwCTvoNGuDsUZ3ZVC9ao1FevYrRwLAWMzVR-1wuUAPZvJeFhzMrZH65mZSOLPQXSqbApkYdhkP0T_ID0xuDAxmYDdhrgriHr9QqCmSxto3BkcMs0dNjePiScHrcaKRutE1ynUyuOY9P1-jUEhLdIDot-4AmPYKaIReQIukRfuD-x-LWCAJHcWTDFkBscqkSVEtvltz5PxNZRd7He_xUgROQbf)
While saying this out loud has gotten me a lot of hate from the left, it's too important to stay quiet.

America is not a racist country, and when we frame one group of people as evil, we teach our children to hate someone based on the color of their skin! These schools are more concerned with indoctrinating our children than teaching them. [**We need to bring education back to our classrooms. We need to stop critical race theory.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25c3615c1a8e4274b21a099aa09a943a&_e=c-onIjiLm-Qw5ysFPYhAcKf8urbPFGYMztvSDi_UfY4Y-XRpYT3rX2bA4yooEbIAZogAftw2SydHjGaQ-F713_Td_uyvBtkqzfHyGaYFfJOno06D5gn26ePpZ4Kq56bgZD9g09L1aL5rbj55jxRvNBJaQB3Y-IwMrzbucUZB12CSh1B3ulCgGiFMv3KPUxITom_MrFfODIboHUcVub2gc3HAMHN8z3jBU_AMokPOwCRSPuullDAhPnSznCHG7CvefdDTwR25M7n1cm6VGSc9GhqoGv4n8AHoL67jwkbVfuswMH0dek9rATXchFDI7OFbTrfVE0SxuA2nNYELr6dMCQlMKi_CG8qkYu4daGLeyAPMPjXDjnAk6LUkpfBWOt1xAn0EPQTlxVYM_vWG_M2rvhf0KuDcGhRj-F093nUAJrkQMvB2NwsFK_hz04siQs3R)

Woke identity politics do not belong in schools. Students should be learning skills to help them thrive in the modern economy, _**not that all people of one skin color are evil.**_

Spending precious classroom time teaching to hate while our rivals teach math and science is a gross disservice to our children. How can they keep up and build the future if they don't have the skills to compete?

[**It's the most toxic stuff imaginable and while I'm here in Arizona helping parents fight for their children, my opponent Mark Kelly is in Washington voting to spend your tax dollars teaching our children to hate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25c3615c1a8e4274b21a099aa09a943a&_e=c-onIjiLm-Qw5ysFPYhAcKf8urbPFGYMztvSDi_UfY4Y-XRpYT3rX2bA4yooEbIAZogAftw2SydHjGaQ-F713_Td_uyvBtkqzfHyGaYFfJOno06D5gn26ePpZ4Kq56bgZD9g09L1aL5rbj55jxRvNBJaQB3Y-IwMrzbucUZB12CSh1B3ulCgGiFMv3KPUxITom_MrFfODIboHUcVub2gc3HAMHN8z3jBU_AMokPOwCSOTVIGll0f45wIMEbNBgERsJ8Z99fAy7NFM4ge4cIWKBJUU_Gy8oTfAiLaOIErxJJSJEjOMJeW5DIi7qEXevLdM98S47OJgKMoPLC7o5KsmjfWCv-9fAc8H1RT2ijwDCyBEtBueCLX-vmFWofyskm2f-peJVBVGI86WmuhJ6rN7awNrEtaG8lZ3odF6__-FYyNxEdroCcKp8hOc_oI1nWR)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We must stop Trump's pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There's just no reason we should be supporting more oil infrastructure right now.
#
Peter,
Last week, I joined my friend Bernie Sanders and some of our Democratic colleagues in the House and Senate to oppose the Line 3 Pipeline. Here’s why:
**Local indigenous tribes have outright opposed this oil pipeline.** It would destroy their land, food sources, and water. Not only were they not consulted, many local indigenous activists have actively protested the pipeline — facing assaults and arrests at the hands of police.
**The impacts of this pipeline on climate change will be devastating.** We cannot be building more fossil fuel infrastructure as the climate crisis becomes more and more irreversible. Climate change has been declared a “code red” for humanity by international experts. There’s just no reason why we should be supporting more oil infrastructure right now.
**[Trump approved this pipeline. Now WE need to stop it. I’m leading the fight against Line 3 in Congress. Can you donate $3 to show the power of our movement to protect indigenous lands and avert further climate disasters?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4973?refcode=em20210825-573&t=19&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4973?refcode=em20210825-573&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)**
We are simply asking President Biden to uphold promises he made about the environment and fighting climate change. Pumping more fossil fuels through more pipelines is NOT part of an environmentally sound policy. And the Biden administration cannot continue the assault on indigenous lands that Trump perpetrated.
Cancel the Line 3 Pipeline and let’s get back to solving the climate crisis. **[If you agree, chip in $3 to fuel my work on this critical issue.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4973?refcode=em20210825-573&t=21&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210825-573-footer&t=22&refcode2=573_420207_wrbnei&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=573%2E420207%2Ewrbnei)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Look, we can fight back and win, but only if we build the largest grassroots mobilization effort that Virginia has ever seen. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Glenn has already shown us he’s pulling out all the stops — from attack ads, to piles and piles of cash, to lying about his extreme views. So we can’t back down. = Thank you, Team Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Navarre for Congress HQ
subject: Stewart’s plans Fwd: Believe in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Stewart’s note, Peter.
The clock is ticking on our end-of-summer goal to bring in 250 donations to elect Stewart to Congress. We only have a few days left this month, so we have to keep the momentum going.
Let’s restore faith in our democracy by sending a problem solver like Stewart to Congress -- chip in $10 today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210825-email&amount=10]
Thank you for your continued support,
Navarre for Congress HQ
--- Forwarded Message ---
Peter,
Since we launched our campaign back in April, I have had the chance to talk with thousands of voters and listen to their concerns. In each conversation, I ask them, “are you better off than your parents and grandparents?” The answer is always yes.
I then ask if they believe their kids and grandkids will be better off — sadly, the answer is almost always no. I am not ready to give up on America because I know when we work together, we can accomplish anything.
That is why I am running for Congress, because too many Americans have begun to doubt our future.
I cannot do this alone, so I am asking 250 folks who are not ready to give up on America to step up and help us hit our end-of-summer goal. Can I count on you to help us today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210825-email]
To restore faith in our country’s promise, we can no longer merely admire the problems -- we have to tackle them head on. We must expand access to healthcare, ensure every child — regardless of their zip code — receives a world class education, fix our crumbling infrastructure and protect the right to vote.
Have you had enough of politics as usual? Me too, and that is why I am running!
I hope you will join our movement today. Any amount is appreciated! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210825-email]
Best,
Stewart
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210825-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210825-email]
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

This is an important message, friend. With the highly transmissible delta variant spreading across Texas at an alarming rate, many hospitals are running out of ICU beds as COVID-19 cases skyrocket among unvaccinated people. Unfortunately, Texas leadership is making it harder for communities to address the recent surge by banning any form of local mask or vaccine mandate. It’s never been more important to get yourself vaccinated and encourage your friends and loved ones to do the same. If you haven’t already, you can get vaccinated by finding a location at **[vaccines.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34650976/302637874/2022325417?refcode=mc-em210811-covidvaccine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODRjYzc0OS1kYzA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-o6_VsvJtzYFOwWgPjzs_hzyrKo7TXMGhaGrmnPiu6E=&emci=3d0247f6-d805-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=b84cc749-dc05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=7689298)**. name: Moms for California
subject: These are not California values
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
California gubernatorial candidate, Larry Elder, says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34651034/302638009/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MGU1ODdjLWRjMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiZjRjYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=It3BiFG504WAXJ-suzYxW2ZOCPd6xI8yZQXyUzsHdaY=&emci=b605eb5f-d705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=260e587c-dc05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Simona Grace here, **California Mother of the Year 2020 **and Founder of Moms in Office. I am reaching out to you today because Larry Elder is doubling down on his attacks on working women and California families. **[Will you stand with Moms of California to oppose the September 14 Right Wing Recall? Peter, we need all hands on deck now to tell every undecided voter to pay attention.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34651035/302638010/949434673?refcode=0825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MGU1ODdjLWRjMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiZjRjYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=It3BiFG504WAXJ-suzYxW2ZOCPd6xI8yZQXyUzsHdaY=)** **California gubernatorial candidate, Larry Elder, says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children. This is outrageous and these values don't represent us as Californians. We must stop Larry Elder to protect the privacy of women. ** Elder also suggested that women who decide to have children are not “dedicated” to their jobs. He critiqued former Massachusetts governor Jane Swift for taking on the role after giving birth to twins, claiming that “to tell women they can run a state, have family and children, and be equally attentive to all — is a lie.” As a mom and advocate fighting for gender equality in our government and beyond, I am appalled to learn about Larry Elder's attack on working women and mothers and I will do everything in my power to stop the Right Wing Republican Recall. **I am asking you to stand with me.** **[Peter, can we count on you to help us stop the Republican recall attempt in California? name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Celebrating an end to prison gerrymandering in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521]

Dear Friend,

We're celebrating a huge victory for Pennsylvanians!

The Legislative Reapportionment Commission (LRC), which is in charge of redistricting, voted to end prison gerrymandering of PA legislative maps. That means that people who are in prison will now be counted as residents of their homes, not as residents of prisons where they are temporarily incarcerated. The current policy unfairly increases legislative representation in areas that have prisons.

For decades, families have struggled to get the constituent services they need for their incarcerated loved ones, and political power has been unjustly shifted away from their communities. So, today, we applaud the LRC for doing the right thing and are thrilled for the 50,000+ incarcerated people across the state who are one step closer to having their full humanity recognized.

A year ago, when we started working on this issue, we were told it was a fool's errand -- but we knew it was worth the work! Please help us continue to work for justice, equity, and progress in
Pennsylvania.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=10.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=20.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=20.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=40.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=40.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521&amount=100.00]

Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082521]

When we work together, we get things done!

Cheers!

Jenna
Keystone Progress Education Fund

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Will you stand with me in the fight to prevent wildfires?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34651891/302642948/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_210825_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJhNDQyOC1kZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLZypP-yVO5NtCrrtQIeYwuGLvhGY4zViZrNe74Ijn4=&emci=daba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ddba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Unfortunately, wildfires are a reality of life on the Central Coast. As your Congressman, it’s my priority to create legislation with a focus on stopping the devastation that comes to our community along with severe wildfires.

**I’ve introduced two pieces of legislation to mitigate the impacts of wildfires and to prevent more from occurring: the Wildfire Emergency Act and the Save our Forests Act.**

[Peter, will you sign on today to show your support for my wildfire-focused legislation and encourage my colleagues in Congress to pass these critical acts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34651892/302642949/2073257937?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_210825_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJhNDQyOC1kZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLZypP-yVO5NtCrrtQIeYwuGLvhGY4zViZrNe74Ijn4=&emci=daba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ddba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=6108787) [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34651893/302642951/2073257937?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_210825_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJhNDQyOC1kZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLZypP-yVO5NtCrrtQIeYwuGLvhGY4zViZrNe74Ijn4=&emci=daba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ddba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=6108787) The Wildfire Emergency Act would provide funding needed to restore our forests and help spur workforce development to train new generations of fire management specialists. The Save our Forests Act would help fill staff vacancies at our National Parks to help mitigate wildfire risk and preserve our natural resources.

**Both these pieces of legislation are crucial to mitigating the impacts of climate change and wildfires.**

[Will you add your name today to show my colleagues in Congress that we have widespread support for wildfire-focused legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34651894/302642980/2073257937?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_210825_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJhNDQyOC1kZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLZypP-yVO5NtCrrtQIeYwuGLvhGY4zViZrNe74Ijn4=&emci=daba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ddba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=6108787) [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34651895/302642981/2073257937?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_210825_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJhNDQyOC1kZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLZypP-yVO5NtCrrtQIeYwuGLvhGY4zViZrNe74Ijn4=&emci=daba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ddba4428-df05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=6108787) Thank you for standing with me,

Jimmy Panetta

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you submit a comment on pistol braces?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friend —
You recently showed interest in submitting a public comment on ghost guns. That comment period is now closed, but we are hoping you will make your voice heard on another very important issue:
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is seeking public input about their proposed rule to regulate the sale of stabilizing pistol braces, a firearm accessory that easily turns an assault pistol into a short-barreled assault rifle and are commonly used in mass shootings. They look like this:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/2438?t=1&akid=734%2E3935704%2EXSBpAm)
It only takes a few minutes to make a big difference. Here’s how:
**Step 1:** Use this link: [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/06/10/2021-12176/factoring-criteria-for-firearms-with-attached-stabilizing-braces#open-comment**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2438?t=2&akid=734%2E3935704%2EXSBpAm)
**Step 2:** Write a comment of your own showing your support for regulating pistol braces, or copy and paste the sample comment we’ve included below.
**Step 3:** Submit before the public comment deadline on Wednesday, September 8th.
We can’t stress enough how important this is. You have a chance to be a part of meaningful change. Please take this opportunity to make your voice heard before the deadline.
Thank you,
The team at Giffords
**\- - - COPY AND PASTE THIS SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
_
I support the Biden administration’s rule on “stabilizing braces” or “arm braces” and I urge the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) to finalize the rule as proposed so that firearms with attached “arm braces” designed to be fired from the shoulder are properly regulated as short-barreled rifles.
Short-barreled rifles are unusually dangerous because they can be easily concealed like a handgun, but have the firepower and accuracy of a rifle. Until recently, they have rarely been used in crime because of a federal law that requires them to be registered with ATF. However, the gun industry has now designed certain accessories to convert AR-15 or AK-47 style pistols into short-barreled rifles, and members of the public are using these accessories to get around the law.
We have already begun to see the horrific consequences when people create unregistered short-barreled rifles using AR-15-style pistols and arm braces. On August 4, 2019, a mass shooter killed nine people and injured 17 in Dayton, Ohio, using this kind of weapon, and on March 22, 2021, a gunman killed 10 people at a grocery store in Boulder, Colorado, using another one. The easy availability of these weapons poses a serious public safety threat. ATF’s proposed rule would better regulate these weapons and is a step forward in addressing an increasingly important public safety problem. I wholly support this rule and urge its immediate adoption.
_

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=734%2E3935704%2EXSBpAm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: We don’t leave Americans behind.
body:
President Biden’s incompetent and mismanaged withdrawal of our troops has put many Americans’ safety in jeopardy.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qfb-L2rzcEyBV1v9I9R2BQ02wudSKR0QKsogCaVCf8n_M4v-6zfgCBsSlg6LMnI1BnFPyoaXjyUi9ZVLQscqzk6w51YK_tBTw8eYL9MPL7ZXtcthQShe8VwD8AxM_D7TnMtXozz61bETTuH7PlgJiBhrulzd262rpJiiWqfjLSeM8Cz7YqdFrTQE_CxtQLYpPoNpZh_7ISQ=&c=f1vXXoYzCt7WBPdk76OQlPvNktdu1VmJ_fpgj_ZEIgWUqrPVWhCPrw==&ch=V-NJC_oK2feLuE6t4UUpdGAa5REyXdQcMH1bHtFEIcbAHp3Bzhiqrg==)
---
| Friend,
President Biden's incompetent and mismanaged withdrawal of our troops has put many Americans' safety in jeopardy. My office has received over 187 cases of Americans and allies being trapped in Kabul. When questioned about the current situation in Afghanistan, the Biden administration plays a long game of passing the blame with no real answers. I refuse to let President Biden's bumbling behavior endanger the well-being of Americans abroad.
---

I refuse to let President Biden's bumbling behavior endanger the well-being of Americans abroad. | == | | | == | We don't leave Americans behind. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Even with Biden's chaos in Afghanistan, VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom and prop him up. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189693:JaLzSglNt:m:1:3253819041:8C7EC4E43CA2EFDDC5D2BB8D53CE5B2A:r)

---
We have a problem, Peter.

Even with Biden's chaos in Afghanistan, **VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom** and prop him up ahead of the recall election.

Harris holds a significant influence on Democrats in the Bay Area who up until now may have been indifferent about the results of the recall election.

We need your help URGENTLY! [**Can you spare $20, $40, $60 or more to help us ensure that Kamala doesn 't sway the outcome of this election?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189693:JaLzSglNt:m:1:3253819041:8C7EC4E43CA2EFDDC5D2BB8D53CE5B2A:r)

The good news is, this "Hail Mary" attempt to protect Newsom **shows just how scared they are that they could lose this recall and another puppet Democrat governor.**

First, they enlisted Elizabeth Warren for their advertising campaign, then President Biden endorsed Newsom in a tweet, and now Kamala Harris is actually coming to California to campaign for Newsom!

_**One would think that the Vice President might have better things to be doing given Pres. Biden 's disaster in Afghanistan**_ - but protecting their radical leftist agenda seems to be much more important to them.

They're scrambling to protect their puppet governor and we need your help to make sure their last-ditch efforts don't work.

[**Will you send in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us make sure that we can turn out every California voter possible to cast a ballot to recall Gavin Newsom?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189693:JaLzSglNt:m:1:3253819041:8C7EC4E43CA2EFDDC5D2BB8D53CE5B2A:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189693:JaLzSglNt:m:1:3253819041:8C7EC4E43CA2EFDDC5D2BB8D53CE5B2A:r)
Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

P.S. Voting by mail is happening as you're reading this, and every minute that goes by without your support is another missed opportunity to help turn out pro-recall votes. [**Please rush your support now and help us overcome the boost Kamala is trying to give to the Left.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189693:JaLzSglNt:m:1:3253819041:8C7EC4E43CA2EFDDC5D2BB8D53CE5B2A:r)

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Showing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Have you heard the news?
#
Have you heard the news?
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12514?refcode=em20210825-378&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=378%2E3698%2EIZO-MM)
From day one, Erica has made it clear: Our campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina is about showing up and leaving no community behind. Going everywhere, and writing no one-off. We have to fight for every single vote in order to flip this seat.
That's why **we launched our bold, new rural outreach campaign to knock on doors and connect with voters in counties that Donald Trump won in 2020** — but there's no way to do it without a ton of help.
[**That's where you come in. We need help to fund this ambitious new program, and a direct donation of $5 (or any amount you can afford) from you would go a long way.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12514?refcode=em20210825-378&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=378%2E3698%2EIZO-MM) _It's simple: Every dollar you contribute funds our ability to knock on one door — $1, one door. $5, five doors. $10, ten doors._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12514?refcode=em20210825-378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=378%2E3698%2EIZO-MM)**
Folks in rural counties, just like Erica's in Eastern North Carolina, have long felt ignored by the Democratic Party. So it's no coincidence that — cycle after cycle — many of these counties have turned red, and they're only growing redder.
But the truth is, we're all being failed by the same broken system, and the only way we can fix it is by coming together.
In order to flip North Carolina blue in 2022, Democrats have to organize in rural areas because every single vote counts. That's exactly what we're going to do.
**There is no county "too red" for our movement, but it's going to take a lot of money to pull off this organizing effort.** [**Can we count on a $5 donation from you to help us connect with voters in red counties across North Carolina?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12514?refcode=em20210825-378&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=378%2E3698%2EIZO-MM)
One county, one community, one block, and one door at a time, we're going to transform our politics and change the country.
Let's do this!
Team Erica Smith

name: John Fetterman
subject: Democrats need to vote like Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I don’t know what they’ll end up doing.
#
Peter,
Last night, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act passed the House. All House Democrats present voted yes. All Republicans voted no.
**Now it’s time for Democrats in the Senate to vote like actual Democrats, swiftly pass this bill, and send it to President Biden's desk.**
And then, when the GOP inevitably obstructs, Democrats need to scrap the filibuster to get this done.
I don’t know what they’ll end up doing, Peter. But I do know this:
[**_Can you rush a donation of any amount to our campaign right now? Even a few bucks will go a LONG way — especially with our August fundraising deadline just around the corner._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28659?refcode=em20210825-2402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2402%2E434096%2EZfnQJ_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28659?refcode=em20210825-2402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2402%2E434096%2EZfnQJ_)**
It’s past time for us to honor the legacy of Rep. John Lewis, a giant of the Civil Rights movement. We must get this + so much more done.
Thank you so much,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210825-2402-footer-test-ctrl&t=25&refcode2=2402_434096_ZfnQJ_&akid=2402%2E434096%2EZfnQJ_)**

body:
---
As I write this message to you, a huge smile is tattooed all over my face... And you’ll understand why in just a minute. I was bullied all my life because of my small size down there. That’s until a few weeks ago when I accidentally stumbled upon a controversial video. This comes as a friendly warning... Make sure no one’s looking over your shoulder or can see your screen... After that, [**watch THIS uncensored video**. ](https://bit.ly/3y8twYv#cl/51548_md/1/11762/2774/259/215325) Because you’re about to see something you might even doubt it’s true. But believe me, it will change your life just like it changed mine. You’re about to experience again what it’s like to see your partner, lover or wife spinning like a cat and melting in your arms... looking at you with that spark in their eyes. Not to mention that you’ll achieve the length and strength you desire in just one minute... Science shows this is a breakthrough for every man over the age of 50. If you’re feeling skeptical... you’re going to be blown away when you [**see what’s on this page**.](https://bit.ly/3y8twYv#cl/51548_md/1/11762/2774/259/215325)

clean_body: As I write this message to you, a huge smile is tattooed all over my face... And you’ll understand why in just a minute. I was bullied all my life because of my small size down there. That’s until a few weeks ago when I accidentally stumbled upon a controversial video. This comes as a friendly warning... Make sure no one’s looking over your shoulder or can see your screen... After that, Because you’re about to see something you might even doubt it’s true. But believe me, it will change your life just like it changed mine. You’re about to experience again what it’s like to see your partner, lover or wife spinning like a cat and melting in your arms... looking at you with that spark in their eyes. Not to mention that you’ll achieve the length and strength you desire in just one minute... Science shows this is a breakthrough for every man over the age of 50. If you’re feeling skeptical... you’re going to be blown away when you

name: Karen Bass
subject: Yesterday, I was thinking about my friend, Congressman John Lewis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

Yesterday, I had the honor of voting to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House -- legislation named in honor of Congressman Lewis and his decades-long dedication to preserving and expanding voting rights.

This package of voter protections will restore the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to its former strength. Eighteen states have passed racist voter restrictions this year, with hundreds more being introduced. **The John Lewis VRAA is necessary to defend our democracy and our civil rights from these undemocratic attacks.**

My friend John understood that the right to vote was the foundation of all other legal rights in America. I know if he was still with us, he would be leading the fight for voting rights. Now, it's on all of us to live up to his legacy and continue that fight for social justice.

**[Today, will you join me in calling on the U.S. Senate to bring the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to a vote? We need to hold them accountable to see this legislation sent to the president's desk without delay. Add your name »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xmms-GuXHFkjzGZhiIFu4b5OHrn4-nO5mJNCe8P5vGU=/rIjCC4wEWIfQmNQ1z80kI2E3-Co4iTFE6dRMZK1aqPI=?gpsid=39_132_20249&ms=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xmms-GuXHFkjzGZhiIFu4b5OHrn4-nO5mJNCe8P5vGU=/rIjCC4wEWIfQmNQ1z80kI2E3-Co4iTFE6dRMZK1aqPI=?gpsid=39_132_20249&ms=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

Make no mistake -- passing the John Lewis VRAA is only one critical step forward. The Senate must also bring the For the People Act to a vote -- to outlaw partisan gerrymandering, enact automatic voter registration and vote-by-mail in every state, and reform campaign finance laws. Our work continues, friend.

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xmms-GuXHFkjzGZhiIFu4b5OHrn4-nO5mJNCe8P5vGU=/E8EUWQigPYW1TStoH3Akp1o9fxpQistKgnAY4hIaJ8Y=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_vraa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

clean_body: Team -- Yesterday, I had the honor of voting to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House -- legislation named in honor of Congressman Lewis and his decades-long dedication to preserving and expanding voting rights. This package of voter protections will restore the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to its former strength. Eighteen states have passed racist voter restrictions this year, with hundreds more being introduced. The John Lewis VRAA is necessary to defend our democracy and our civil rights from these undemocratic attacks. My friend John understood that the right to vote was the foundation of all other legal rights in America. I know if he was still with us, he would be leading the fight for voting rights. Now, it's on all of us to live up to his legacy and continue that fight for social justice. Make no mistake -- passing the John Lewis VRAA is only one critical step forward. The Senate must also bring the For the People Act to a vote -- to outlaw partisan gerrymandering, enact automatic voter registration and vote-by-mail in every state, and reform campaign finance laws. Our work continues, friend. In solidarity, Karen Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today. Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress Bass for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 United States We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Blake Masters
subject: What I said to upset every liberal in the Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
Open to find out how I p*ssed them off | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1zYN6X1M0N8Hk7Nhck77NPq_GoSAVmUoHdCBLGVNwzfoR54gGiV2ELNaclB98jK3_l7aM79Oi7Gipwk3jV0ui4vs_BKy3--5SgZ3_URSY4Ol4hWDajqry7Lpx2W8-ff6ful3JWIMDvzuqVytViGcyYUkTYvyUqZVbjQSsV-UPE6sq7l4q-zBG4GaanWcwqZaI1A4dxMV3AtrSIDBSXgeW8g)

---
Peter,

Over the past few weeks, I've been attending school board meetings across Arizona. In every meeting, I hear from a small, but vocal, group of people demanding that the schools teach kids that America is fundamentally racist and irredeemably evil. I was appalled by what I’ve heard, so I sounded the alarm.

**I went on Tucker Carlson and publicly called critical race theory it what it is: Racism.**

## ⬇️ WATCH MY INTERVIEW NOW ⬇️
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1xmpQTr4jG5-XogpOyvzbcVaKe2eo1JReclYaxUa01zUOEsJxOSHU1Gr82G-3zdKPPW82V2ZitfLz1LG4Bz23eKfPMjX99_slQZoxWS-F4PPleezOoHLzRg1PIYJ-KZsTbIsJrydJJ1iVB34TCFWElhusb-_4177y4PH4RVRvQS_z84KWjTtcWObqSNRzMUxJcODb4TxdZ7QlWQwbmZOYVR)
While saying this out loud has gotten me a lot of hate from the left, it's too important to stay quiet.

America is not a racist country, and when we frame one group of people as evil, we teach our children to hate someone based on the color of their skin! These schools are more concerned with indoctrinating our children than teaching them. [**We need to bring education back to our classrooms. We need to stop critical race theory.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1wm8TvZ0V1rxiG427CYG4R3CXeTDFZ_NhU4h88O8rdQ0IO8L4B9d_QVTn9zRYwXs9Dvb4s1AGBcZRX54CzVVXoumFthp_6ZgAk4sJ4Jcxh3MkaP9dv64lXQ7Tt3JCclHOmdbTpcmqt1PE2Sgb5qZJLGfSW9pGmCj6MV80NDvOtcpsSWVqc8bJ0Q47ym-xOqPBY5TU5GvwUIbutr1LVXstFA)

Woke identity politics do not belong in schools. Students should be learning skills to help them thrive in the modern economy, _**not that all people of one skin color are evil.**_

Spending precious classroom time teaching to hate while our rivals teach math and science is a gross disservice to our children. How can they keep up and build the future if they don't have the skills to compete?

[**It's the most toxic stuff imaginable and while I'm here in Arizona helping parents fight for their children, my opponent Mark Kelly is in Washington voting to spend your tax dollars teaching our children to hate.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1ysHgSxROlXG2bBSDs0zZhppyvWIbzw8htJ7jeODJ_Vqhd4tNLLVCz_3PeJxczOrXYbCz0zRI6FP7QMSH1wkRYaGnPX2L0v7CqmvC0Fs_YFn9F85uae1b-765cRl-w8YpEqABVy8Fz0hXs84HRDBN1_nVjzsu6IpvEFOSqKU4KUZFTWzmSLJbqn1TGfHGbnF5fIyClWn5fZj9eq-Aw3n4kj)

A political rubber stamp like Mark Kelly won't stand up for our children, [**can you help me beat him?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1ygeMspp6oM8Hs5GuO2Qkm_w_CtJoOxQgg2ld28QvFvjfBDTu241pjKwAMWf38JnWXeqBSOeHyDgQSqaNmyzcuEJmZOLM4cTvJUs0YgwMdaLID6AWi1kt4OORO6HzX17LcDcOyg7OA6VQJbLnJj5H1ULHRqXFDOI_Mzj5PPZgH28z6G4EQY9YU3QfWzmr6V-HaAxwB0xE4dKDZivoXTya4B)

[**Will you contribute $5 today to help me Take Back Arizona and protect our children from the left’s hateful indoctrination?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1w9lmTeprDP5fTH5ZPRxue7Ykg-NZhN6C2OyvwBWy9xKeZCrgPuKJm-q3GwVLvmiXkPBjH5MeaTN7MtTdu6MuILCZT64Uj6p3Yt8DFXz3DrD6ReyqxtnE1Va-pPDPtd5gU00gocgK52ka0HNq6jvV0aNrdO18yx8A__boL3Tfcu3yPXJXxbH0SCypMuL-3JsJXkC6dhvWCfjMwG_iZuPpJK)

Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

**P.S. I am ready to be a disruptive force for change in Washington, but I need your help.** Winning a campaign against an entrenched Democrat with millions in the bank is going to take the support of folks like you. [**If you are ready for a political outsider, will you chip in $10 or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1znGBWTfkfOmq3tMu1OyYFBqJpYL1MQS4SnnSknvbnvo0TE_znu8LKTFzbq_pC_9Aaj7N-dThbYiOB41yOHv4kMWzX-bXE67oH62U6LyCNnGQ73t1z8CtxV_Cd29lHG5jDGMB-0Co10tmu8lx7PJZQSHGYJvH6qqX1ZtxPsGXvdMTj3sPG794cbvmJH3fRS3AAAIPD3-cydl6t8omIjhai9)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=62633a0fecbe4e4390ca4e88fc63637c&_e=PLBSBtRdfOw6YS91WyWcgmr7eg4QdUMFfykT5qMYBoGWJJq56pBQOJRcOv_4-jLVb3gg__XWdVN_MRKgoaxmCkmcfXG5o_I1GVJXPpL2_oZlUtj-dtlDLalidcxZ3YHdq2JhVOYkFX6hjdJM5hUZxUsKxBN8YGbwyifRAmf6sZoq59GdQg7m6ePV4dLdS6e2p04p8Jh0ODIVFECumEaITK04JshfUIuWm2yepnkll1yLD_BeG2_uzSrv4qqQmCoRzJOIZ2DOL1ZDZ9OnMKbKzWt_fFJOVKiKaJItRowJ5KcrBxRqjtw01XyzGuUl9yyda9M3ZJIQ8iZCtbfauQSEg1gfoxqgf4M-IlxwtBDeKiVnszwyyaXQ3Tl8iCPUtu3jF1vWFLaeBwHUkng4rWe9DhsuHjCNIs2y_DRvdBGo1fiw8-U_FHSd42EL5sz0nYTx)

body:
A few weeks ago, on the day of the filing deadline, a new opponent joined the race against me in what was seemingly an unplanned, careless, last-minut | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=f3b6e4f358964f0dae7e03bde72f6979&_e=pN4zADoTTvBk9eqv6xGF7q5Ardp-K_jwAlmrX8X-N0luHs0Opd5oNabUkJN4esjf827TLtNOd9sLWzLFs6y-hIas048jRTlav3zbkwH2mNEmNck8bOUvWnxFDCGQh7RZIROwsQZVevAH7uw2S1AqPa6H66nPOMmlq_qhNKyFUyqT2CM5YM0tWTn0PR5OgzUv0ZKSmxIiVJJWKmj7fme6v2Cl_V6n-_DPGOWtHRnRm3jpYB2JybJozSwHMb_wAqVYZaVoJuS2BjrepFv2HKthd7WsjP-75WYZwrJVwuIsUkeaROyDhoB37zWqj4x_epgGcnfjOOs7MLzo47zbfdlaepmlIvu2peHs0APIksSgrTYqQeDpV5V1cDFpOnkb_0-d9QCcEWrq7hraAKQGWdl4_GXXWkg2jk-TXdNe1UkLtNyq_T3lQDbJRw4hv2k6xP7eQrFAZpxKb6Sy1MrHr9lqWjQgNiDNGwh9tF3UFBTlYo0%3D) Folks, I have an important reminder: A few weeks ago, on the day of the filing deadline, a new opponent joined the race against me in what was seemingly an unplanned, careless, last-minute decision. With no clear plans and refusing to tell Helena her agenda, she ran for mayor simply because as she said, she “wanted a choice”. Well, the choice is clear. I have proven time and time again that I will fight for Helena and do what it takes to improve our beautiful city. I have helped make strides. I have goals for our future, plans to make them happen, and most importantly, I care about YOU. My decision to run for mayor was not made lightly, and if you value our wonderful city like I know you do, you won’t make your decision lightly either. **[Helena deserves better and deserves someone who will take their job seriously. So please, chip in to help me raise $2,500 to defeat my extreme, out-of-touch opponent today.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=f3b6e4f358964f0dae7e03bde72f6979&_e=ZGUTx2KxB2nFT8A-FySyvxwylAH43smXIFUO3p3KuAkmCgQl2Y7jb439lt9zkoWSJRfuyQvdu47U9PN5R8n05vT7LecrpNJ3UuxSSTUDBBHai_z-5Brt7Ete4qn4DJl23MbxiIJhR8SGznZBTMmYUQNh7pfJgFhS4BXmEHlZgY1ScFHwQsRq2hGafxrRpAe6MUssXNj33chBb8vaiQSXM1KdUMAnKzqVRM4l7X2AV_m516RET_dRISHLTsG38MteirrnFD4wtfzy-x6M0Y9aSjFYLgKngRDnK4ufrEbbD19dU4X4Km_W8KFQe266SahJtmXOAbWRHbp1oboNxWTrD_wp0yTczwGfXo7oY5oUILPMJfEPaPa7UEQT2RQy6-MGFPIleCDfvg6tv4HXo08oDNy8tGhrVmir48aWPyHN0lsDwYGeOMzxlOQrSYn65EwF5vQgsGZ1A5CB28aJi2YZ4IzPDDWUW1wz190aTFKtMTs%3D)** clean_body: A few weeks ago, on the day of the filing deadline, a new opponent joined the race against me in what was seemingly an unplanned, careless, last-minut | | | Folks, I have an important reminder: A few weeks ago, on the day of the filing deadline, a new opponent joined the race against me in what was seemingly an unplanned, careless, last-minute decision. With no clear plans and refusing to tell Helena her agenda, she ran for mayor simply because as she said, she “wanted a choice”. Well, the choice is clear. I have proven time and time again that I will fight for Helena and do what it takes to improve our beautiful city. I have helped make strides. I have goals for our future, plans to make them happen, and most importantly, I care about YOU. My decision to run for mayor was not made lightly, and if you value our wonderful city like I know you do, you won’t make your decision lightly either. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you so much for standing with me, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Are you ready for bold, progressive leadership in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | If you need anymore evidence of why we need bold, progressive Democrats in Congress, take a look at the barrage of headlines coming out of Washington:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34655181/302654551/1601473053?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210825_1_1&refcode2=e55dd375-e905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVkZDM3NS1lOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_zmt-FOl1QrNKJvycrj4t2Kpk0Gv07LlPAXwDyJE80=)
So-called ‘centrist’ Democrats used their influence in Congress to slow down the budget reconciliation blueprint. While the budget has passed in the House, these Democrats put up a strong fight against voting on popular policies.

This budget would include new investments in paid family leave, Medicare, and child care — not to mention investments in the fight against the climate crisis. It includes policies that President Biden ran on and won back the White House with. _The same policies that are supported by millions of hard-working Wisconsinites._

I’m at my wit’s end with Democrats attempting to block ambitious policies that will help working people and our environment. **It’s flat-out shameful.**

[If you, like me, are ready for bold, progressive leadership in Congress, then chip in now to my campaign. We’re on the verge of our critical end-of-month deadline before, and we need to raise another $20,000 to keep pace with my Wall Street funded Democratic opponents >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34655182/302654552/1601473053?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210825_1_1&refcode2=e55dd375-e905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVkZDM3NS1lOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_zmt-FOl1QrNKJvycrj4t2Kpk0Gv07LlPAXwDyJE80=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Listen, it’s bad enough when Republicans grandstand and throw fits to try to block legislation aimed at helping working people. We’re all used to this nonsense.

It’s a whole other matter when Democrats, _the party of working people_ , do the same thing. There’s only one way to stop it from happening — **elect progressive Democrats.**

[If you feel the same way, then click the link and chip in right now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34655191/302654562/1601473053?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210825_1_1&refcode2=e55dd375-e905-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVkZDM3NS1lOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_zmt-FOl1QrNKJvycrj4t2Kpk0Gv07LlPAXwDyJE80=)

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | If you need anymore evidence of why we need bold, progressive Democrats in Congress, take a look at the barrage of headlines coming out of Washington: = So-called ‘centrist’ Democrats used their influence in Congress to slow down the budget reconciliation blueprint. While the budget has passed in the House, these Democrats put up a strong fight against voting on popular policies. This budget would include new investments in paid family leave, Medicare, and child care — not to mention investments in the fight against the climate crisis. It includes policies that President Biden ran on and won back the White House with. The same policies that are supported by millions of hard-working Wisconsinites. I’m at my wit’s end with Democrats attempting to block ambitious policies that will help working people and our environment. It’s flat-out shameful. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Listen, it’s bad enough when Republicans grandstand and throw fits to try to block legislation aimed at helping working people. We’re all used to this nonsense. It’s a whole other matter when Democrats, the party of working people , do the same thing. There’s only one way to stop it from happening — elect progressive Democrats. = = Thank you for stepping up, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

Hey Peter, We’re glad to reach you today – _we want to THANK YOU for signing up for email updates from Kevin and our team!_ It is Kevin’s honor and privilege to serve Oklahoma’s First District in Congress. He’s proud to serve as an unwavering advocate for our rural conservative values, leading the charge to stop this radical-left agenda in Washington and restore our great nation’s promise. **He fought alongside President Trump to Make America Great Again, and continues to fight every single day for jobs and opportunity, for our nation’s border security, for our constitutional rights, and to defend the right to life.** As a subscriber to my email list, you’ll now receive regular updates as we move forward, and you’ll have opportunities to share your opinion and get more involved. Take this one quick action today to make sure our emails reach your inbox: _Add info@hernforcongress.com to your email address book, contacts list, or safe senders list. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4bd021dbf2394952836e201a5a5ccf54&_e=5sxOb1zI6R8hdKsIFGWgUyU_tCVSj_uvR9BU39qXTObZD8v5x_qyUsTpsLT1AAP5hvHQSzUlXlFGMsNHRhuK7CuV03iGbrE8twaOarDdb8LazMjRJ9UNCAUKPeqqBiv8weFuoZhWQfbW2ELTZN6JbfXlxeu9VP-zf2UsUp5sxJ31KC2V9QzO9DjNdRDFkT3_iPrbQ3sBKHuxASb3UXYoaEGtOiuOLHWcFdvilh6jKz2P_DfG_SWjmXQ9VPAvw9neyVBeVlQwACvxe3v1F-vFZN8KpNOTZcvfw-vo25c8QkGIjNdHfMF_8pposh-1BBSlccFZP4t7KyIt37WPyNwoDZc7fzTDp1g7ut0jgrmIpzUXSU0r0TsIOLlsvrJF90SyOuLqG99p7tI0fAAzKr84tnU78Ay9m9G_-qiSFaOwisqd6_VrllcIXwNKXEWoQpKPSNAa7W6R4oMXu2EGqO4DE61QTWO6yEUSuzgYN0w9zlVv0OczgafozKY-Ui36-EuU3FOFRVjUUCf6krQqgUwK9WcUFoQFj_F5jHSwliWcxwcyuzxmltLfzDtsocTUN6uPHPwCRMABCPTM24BAZH-p_yYRJEm6jxhhDI0KIiZH_7k%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4bd021dbf2394952836e201a5a5ccf54&_e=5sxOb1zI6R8hdKsIFGWgUyU_tCVSj_uvR9BU39qXTObZD8v5x_qyUsTpsLT1AAP5hvHQSzUlXlFGMsNHRhuK7CuV03iGbrE8twaOarDdb8LazMjRJ9UNCAUKPeqqBiv8weFuoZhWQfbW2ELTZN6JbfXlxeu9VP-zf2UsUp5sxJ31KC2V9QzO9DjNdRDFkT3_iPrbQ3sBKHuxASb3UXYoaEGtOiuOLHWcFdvilh6jKz2P_DfG_SWjmXQ9VPAvw9neyVBeVlQwACvxe3v1F-vFZN8KpNOTZcvfw-vo25c8QkGIjNdHfMF_8pposh-1BBSlccFZP4t7KyIt37WPyNwoDZc7fzTDp1g7ut0jgrmIpzUXSU0r0TsIOLlsvrJF90SyOuLqG99p7tI0fAAzKr84tkAiQM-pt4tcik-5sS3QZI00Juty967S4yvgt1pqy2zP1SkwrV5Ch92ZsA4mVbfM9FvhOIOFkxsuheIkBpEEV7Ewva4XdeHzjGuZYB8QpzSu_NEWBO3l6O1JcXJvoCaYHwNFCmA3BoKtAudZsO35JDvr28zJHxWnhLmVUFV0CGKfLbF35o_vG93wx4w11X7Y7z9wzY8jxMmhY1vWbxQltvM%3D)

Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. name: Herschel Walker
subject: [WATCH] personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189868:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189869:6ZWF5glBN:m:1:3253819041:E822E291859CC0561F9CAC0FBAFFF0EF:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

| | Peter, Last week, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media \-- writing, “Dead men can't pass laws”. This is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party \-- and it proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. Right-wing extremists like Edward Florea are threatening Raphael Warnock personally. And CNN reports that Trump ally Kelly Loeffler \-- who lost her Georgia Senate seat on January 5 by less than 100,000 votes \-- is seriously considering challenging Warnock in 2022. Peter, CNN just declared Warnock the #1 most vulnerable Democrat in the country in 2022. And if Warnock loses his Senate seat, Democrats will hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell. That means: Goodbye, voting rights reform. Goodbye, universal health care. Goodbye, expansions to Medicare and Social Security. We are doing all we can to re-elect Raphael Warnock and protect our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. But yesterday, we FAILED to reach our fundraising goal. YOU stepped up in a big way to elect Raphael Warnock and give Democrats a 50/50 Senate. It's only because of you that Democrats have been able to pass COVID-19 relief and get more money into the hands of Americans. But with GOP extremists becoming more empowered by feckless GOP members of Congress like Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, there hasn't been a more important moment for you to give again to protect Raphael Warnock and our Senate Majority. **[We MUST raise $3,270 before midnight tonight to protect Raphael Warnock's Senate seat and keep our Democratic Senate.
