name: Derek Marshall
subject: California is drying up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I’ll be blunt. I’m worried about California’s future. **

We’re running out of water because of ongoing drought.

We’re running out of forests because of wildfires.

We’re running out of fresh air because of smoke & pollution.

**The climate crisis is already here.** The only thing we can do is pass a Green New Deal, immediately. The problem is, California’s 8th district doesn’t have a climate champion in office. In fact, it’s quite the opposite. [**I’m running for Congress to be the climate champion that my district needs so badly. Every single dollar you invest in us goes back into our campaign to swing this district blue. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34656345/302658364/-1805461027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM3ZmZiNy1lZDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Klw8iWLiu3dr_RiohDkgEzfjZ0dMi5t6BCen3xgfBKs=)

California’s 8th district has long been what both parties assume is a “safe” red district. And freshman Congressman Jay Obernolte is certainly a classic, Trump-backed Republican. **In the midst of a drought, Jay Obernolte voted against removing dangerous toxins from our water supplies, which are already precious enough.** But here’s the thing.

I don’t think the people of California’s 8th want our environmental problems to get worse. **The folks in my district have been dealing with these issues for a long time, and it’s only getting worse for us.** Los Angeles already gets 40% of its water supply from our aquifer. And it’s quite literally running out. [**If you think we need a change in Congress too, you can help RIGHT NOW by donating to our movement. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34656349/302658367/-1805461027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM3ZmZiNy1lZDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Klw8iWLiu3dr_RiohDkgEzfjZ0dMi5t6BCen3xgfBKs=)
We don’t have any time to waste. California is on fire and communities across the country are feeling the devastating impacts of climate change. I’ll be a Congressman that stands up for climate action, who’ll work tirelessly for a better future, for everyone. But we need help now.[**Can I count on you for support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34656356/302658373/-1805461027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM3ZmZiNy1lZDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Klw8iWLiu3dr_RiohDkgEzfjZ0dMi5t6BCen3xgfBKs=)
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

name: Jon Stewart
subject: President Ron DeSantis?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

As COVID cases have skyrocketed in Florida, Ron DeSantis has made plenty of time to travel the country raising money for his 2024 Presidential run.

Floridians are angry: a new Quinnipiac poll shows that only 35% of Floridians think that’s a good idea. They want him to do his job, not run for President.

There’s more: the poll also shows that a majority of Floridians disapprove of DeSantis’ handling of COVID in schools, and his approval rating is under 50%.

We’re keeping the pressure on DeSantis, and we can win this race. Help us make sure he’s a one-term Governor and a zero-term President by making a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-q-poll-aug]

We send you plenty of emails about polling, but there’s a reason.

Every poll over the past two months has shown that DeSantis is vulnerable. We can and we will win this race if supporters like you continue to step up and we keep the pressure on DeSantis through next year.

Friends, Nikki is the only candidate who can stop DeSantis-and it’s on all of us to help her do it. Click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-q-poll-aug]

Thanks,
Jon Stewart
Deputy Finance Director

Miami, FL 33143

body:
National Republicans are preparing for an expensive fight in Wisconsin. Here's why:

**[Our chances of defending and expanding our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority hinge on Wisconsin -- and a major political forecaster recently upgraded this race to a toss-up. Donate now to help our campaign prepare for the tough fight ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34657224/302661451/-1936136847?gpsid=14_130_20248&refcode=em21_210825_eom3_fnd_gq_act__wsu_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210825_eom3_fnd_gq_act__wsu_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg2ZWJjZC1lZjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jmy_JxfF05L_LOZhoq3kveTgq-BnVDm4_8o-2V0Z9Xg=)**

Republicans already have millions in the bank to keep this Senate seat red, and Ron Johnson raised a mountain of cash last quarter for his campaign. While they spend an obscene amount of money to buy this Senate seat, we're going to keep running our people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support to win.

**With the Senate split 50-50, Wisconsin could be our last line of defense.** Republicans only need to flip one seat to retake control, which means they're going to come after Sarah Godlewski with everything they've got. The good news is, Sarah has a track record of defeating the GOP in statewide elections, and she can do it again with your help.

But we have to fight back now, Peter. Coming up short is not an option because our race is one of only two toss-ups this election cycle. That's why we're working around the clock to lay the groundwork for another successful campaign.

**The fight to defend and expand our fragile Democratic Senate majority will be won or lost in Wisconsin. The good news is, Sarah has a track record of defeating the GOP in statewide elections, and she can do it again with your help. But we have to fight back now, Peter. One thing is for sure – I don’t want Democrats doing my budget. They have no idea what the average family spends in a year to keep the lights on. | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03dfb050b7bd432c8790cc7616a73559&_e=RkEKMFka8YykdZNV1OWpGNhU6_BDFxBR4DOrup4G5MG4fEmal_mtZzhosWs1gn_NNvyrEh1rpoD7wF4xcNR88NbQfhYTrefa2VlrfTPzE9i-13on5L9OnHAdD7YxWNp0dT8Lo4tK4B_3IMrkpVthNKajoG94F4XnfXPMhxjNzL8Og_PdADrMF42UwYZp89DWpQ6ZMBt0XdtWVx1XaQut74gtycdmWFE18gwQxtsMQhmazxgweQmcim2a6E3HcKSH9l1HtgQtCEGP3lfcEKuYNHFZ3Gez10KLsxMPHxcrrOO4uV8T6utDp6Wk0lW2WtwjuYVarsMpLPTlWfcH10y4Etb5eSJs-JuzRIIaJS6__FM_ocFEDe0BbKBRza3Edpdx)

Fellow American,

I wanted to take a moment and let you know that House Democrats, with the smallest majority in modern history, have just passed the most expensive legislation in the history of the United States.

This budget - written and championed by avowed socialist Bernie Sanders - will cost the American people $68 TRILLION more in taxes and will raise costs on American families earning under $400,000. It’s a dangerous path to socialism and I won’t stand for it.

At a time when unchecked spending is causing runaway inflation, Democrats just unanimously passed legislation that would add $17 TRILLION to the national debt.

One thing is for sure - I don’t want Democrats doing my budget.

They have no idea what the average family spends in a year to keep the lights on, the roof over their heads, and food stocked. They only care about spending your tax dollars and increasing government dependency.

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03dfb050b7bd432c8790cc7616a73559&_e=RkEKMFka8YykdZNV1OWpGNhU6_BDFxBR4DOrup4G5MG4fEmal_mtZzhosWs1gn_NNvyrEh1rpoD7wF4xcNR88NbQfhYTrefa2VlrfTPzE9i-13on5L9OnHAdD7YxWNp0dT8Lo4tK4B_3IMrkpVthNKajoG94F4XnfXPMhxjNzL8xqxP-x7lb3t4As92xs-Q8nzxKbHkzitgSWvkQIzr9FcmUHijfE0OvrokYqcAJw2_N7AgS74CwdA3EQwDtddNKYcGingev35YuHbx2DInAnisJSYLUSD-PzcU-E7YanU_Es5u43MmCLMz0CusTXw3oFnvVq7D95DU0XbdRUEqAfcYRlaIdT5wvKCp979jHJylVttz9e_I-Ka-qi6EsaPe8)

[ STOP THE SOCIALIST SPENDING ➔ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03dfb050b7bd432c8790cc7616a73559&_e=RkEKMFka8YykdZNV1OWpGNhU6_BDFxBR4DOrup4G5MG4fEmal_mtZzhosWs1gn_NNvyrEh1rpoD7wF4xcNR88NbQfhYTrefa2VlrfTPzE9i-13on5L9OnHAdD7YxWNp0dT8Lo4tK4B_3IMrkpVthNKajoG94F4XnfXPMhxjNzL_hAZLGeWRXWExBvtb0CFhBFUg6irmEV2v0wSdR-i6amqLYGnqM3Z4M5x6BG6Gm-0NOJ67L8y-ZXxH-v6OQZarBqZNrthnYrEMzfpc1vUrwloBFKqMHoK1i9PAzysxQo-4WHmiWZoMDtvKLXVrXxAF_l8yaFXatFRp6u2Ee7THnBuj6q_zVCulguzc18GsOZ2Cx1a_SGIbPuIRn04C5-3Tp)

All that Democrats know how to do is tax hardworking American families and spend like they have a blank check. It’s time to stop this spending spree and elect conservatives who know the struggles of everyday Americans - and care about the safety and security of our children and grandchildren.

[**Will you help me?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03dfb050b7bd432c8790cc7616a73559&_e=RkEKMFka8YykdZNV1OWpGNhU6_BDFxBR4DOrup4G5MG4fEmal_mtZzhosWs1gn_NNvyrEh1rpoD7wF4xcNR88NbQfhYTrefa2VlrfTPzE9i-13on5L9OnHAdD7YxWNp0dT8Lo4tK4B_3IMrkpVthNKajoG94F4XnfXPMhxjNzL_CAdZMnfGU9eTE6DRq2AdpvBevKS6Vz7p1_neAGcopMEAWYWuqqMkDTIuHyvimnDWlb-9_Ryxegq3-9P0AgOmfCHt8edtbD2Q9vX__3CzmPiKzoZHft0_Y9KkivlwqYT6VKn_umzv0tH16JsE1o0X5cZS7yH4mAGlPSfpDdUZKxhOVk1tM5zzPchB6gw8xqo2aQDCYtiveBWwNGnKYZugr)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e91680e07644255a4403b699cdbcd78&_e=WGABr2VmrexV5NQDZ8hIZ6o74iZvT1RfDArD9dvSGYKcO5B_UNpY8oaS_s7BQoRpRGZSzSbVEECTEhpirlw-AsPTwSShT2AH7MBd04eEpgUqKBj1FBHCDqY2xvtBy7oVefLK9jrhnqiIbIqOVBq4nfT3B6ae3sZnCIP3NtIjKCOdOr9N4TJpEIFodbSoEokM4zUSqlsSy6-54ARTBxQkgwAFJNZjfWT7RaMZrO3Zp_rOOzYqGb7tLIqy9-H67Zinh18bJ11FsZIC0L0lh8Kk8rgUUVEK5SUkkzw-NGtG3vXt4w1sLeu-TWlhU080tzPJ1hwt3CMzEU870D0HkNb2G-8XLylUPcQALWLMIVb25FOJZeOVOvqZnXJ2wInoV81WAdyZM6Jha15-XaGvQ2QaeF2nQLxeyEXshGbANEc2rJZ5FufPyzW1O-NIrPJ8OrNRYtUDTEKajMbWAYPSC-BLtjcuHRJcSHCv0Y-bXpZ6e6tmfjdz8c2IPm5W8iH7UXZgW-gcy_O2-p_ZGWBQ8aqodA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e91680e07644255a4403b699cdbcd78&_e=WGABr2VmrexV5NQDZ8hIZ6o74iZvT1RfDArD9dvSGYKcO5B_UNpY8oaS_s7BQoRpRGZSzSbVEECTEhpirlw-AsPTwSShT2AH7MBd04eEpgUqKBj1FBHCDqY2xvtBy7oVefLK9jrhnqiIbIqOVBq4nfT3B6ae3sZnCIP3NtIjKCOdOr9N4TJpEIFodbSoEokM4zUSqlsSy6-54ARTBxQkgwAFJNZjfWT7RaMZrO3Zp_rOOzYqGb7tLIqy9-H67Zinh18bJ11FsZIC0L0lh8Kk8rgUUVEK5SUkkzw-NGtG3vXt4w1sLeu-TWlhU080tzPJrsfcU5W1n30BqqX3331zp3LR4f2VxfxkvSfkAK3ugwJSNopVPPs_FLmC3M64_ysdU64f2EdlywCdGsAE5TcAKTIYIfm1HL2m_NPg47j9jPuosq6PD2r_o_3vqS1IkHJIQyODNSUra9Q8Z8f9Tm8zvyhUT0Epl7xqX40lQS4xdhaIzuxYgCI5zPkDlEaQ2q2Gs9aOq7pJZJNrFJbB9v2tnQ%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e91680e07644255a4403b699cdbcd78&_e=WGABr2VmrexV5NQDZ8hIZ6o74iZvT1RfDArD9dvSGYKcO5B_UNpY8oaS_s7BQoRpRGZSzSbVEECTEhpirlw-AsPTwSShT2AH7MBd04eEpgUqKBj1FBHCDqY2xvtBy7oVefLK9jrhnqiIbIqOVBq4nfT3B6ae3sZnCIP3NtIjKCOdOr9N4TJpEIFodbSoEokM4zUSqlsSy6-54ARTBxQkgwAFJNZjfWT7RaMZrO3Zp_rOOzYqGb7tLIqy9-H67Zinh18bJ11FsZIC0L0lh8Kk8rgUUVEK5SUkkzw-NGtG3vXt4w1sLeu-TWlhU080tzPJKgPuxYLc_uSoJJLFdK7XzKcAej_Y_iUqwZAku6wFtWp5maMehGPs5h0lKM0GHABQInyyJ728qqukiFCl5Jfsq6iyD_YC5B63YQ6PaPtg65EGm-s8TeHJVYke7QtsJ3NigEzzZGBY1NirTAHbSczE8HVjnzlyXarGdCIe4nVFLLw5NmzRtNkGHKxHCd8FcTX4CqNDT6gHaFk2p_z_b7wxfQ%3D%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e91680e07644255a4403b699cdbcd78&_e=WGABr2VmrexV5NQDZ8hIZ6o74iZvT1RfDArD9dvSGYKcO5B_UNpY8oaS_s7BQoRpRGZSzSbVEECTEhpirlw-AsPTwSShT2AH7MBd04eEpgUqKBj1FBHCDqY2xvtBy7oVefLK9jrhnqiIbIqOVBq4nfT3B6ae3sZnCIP3NtIjKCOdOr9N4TJpEIFodbSoEokM4zUSqlsSy6-54ARTBxQkgwAFJNZjfWT7RaMZrO3Zp_rOOzYqGb7tLIqy9-H67Zinh18bJ11FsZIC0L0lh8Kk8rgUUVEK5SUkkzw-NGtG3vXt4w1sLeu-TWlhU080tzPJJYBlGBq9PdTlgvBwfb5uNih3tcOqo3F54toF5OVBYwgxicvEG-ya7ErkPupvsJUANXBx7xQIRAZpbKHXPBHMh44VtpjeadESAdM2mq-FWW98zRfZ0ApSOF472RYo5mPNCKT_TDTHTbglqgGR0NCJWmXanK4GsvtvWUh9VfEwy1mEdeIlFnHK7x0aKLviR8-Top9DejQPbQpgOxGSqkX6mw%3D%3D) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e91680e07644255a4403b699cdbcd78&_e=WGABr2VmrexV5NQDZ8hIZ6o74iZvT1RfDArD9dvSGYKcO5B_UNpY8oaS_s7BQoRpRGZSzSbVEECTEhpirlw-AsPTwSShT2AH7MBd04eEpgUqKBj1FBHCDqY2xvtBy7oVefLK9jrhnqiIbIqOVBq4nfT3B6ae3sZnCIP3NtIjKCOdOr9N4TJpEIFodbSoEokM4zUSqlsSy6-54ARTBxQkgwAFJNZjfWT7RaMZrO3Zp_rOOzYqGb7tLIqy9-H67Zinh18bJ11FsZIC0L0lh8Kk8rgUUVEK5SUkkzw-NGtG3vXt4w1sLeu-TWlhU080tzPJeh-wHddREKzsOzEvB9zEMZWQAzwwlhwxL0OgJaHUnBxbUiQBh0UMHV_n4cZEFf3qw21h-mM0BnyQy2gkj-7_wBrPTx0qBRbwrBzvFiNApcUSmf2ruBK86ywTkwlCDWFGxqmXrj9P_RJIDobd4_C0ZOmNEOMGMGOpPrBNWRv3V1__2qY_XItJzHeDFSuW0e-0uWcwkpXgPqvNkPszsSu88A%3D%3D)

As you may know, I tend to speak my mind and I never beat around the bush -- just like President Trump -- so believe me when I say this: I'm very worried.
Hey Peter, this is Jim Jordan.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Humbly asking for your support to defeat the Republican recall and defend this Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
As you may know, there is a Republican recall attempt happening in California right now.
A group of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump supporters is doing everything they can to replace Gavin Newsom with one of their own, and you can bet they’re going to set their sights on our campaign next.
So I am humbly asking for your support to help Gavin Newsom defeat the Republican recall and defend this Senate seat for Democrats.
The recall polls are close and the deadline to turn in ballots is just weeks away. That is why I am asking:
[**Will you split a $3 contribution to defeat the Republican recall attempt in California, and to our campaign for Senate? It’s going to take a lot of individual contributions to beat the Republican recall and hold on to this Senate seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-recall-split?source=em210825-1-15&t=1&refcode2=252_159979_vUBV5T&akid=252%2E159979%2EvUBV5T)

Right now, we have two announced Republican opponents and are the top endangered Democrat in California. We're also a top target for GOP Super PACs and special interests - I have 3 (!) different GOP groups running ads against me as I type this. Despite everything that's been going on in the world, they're attacking me because I introduced a bill to ban corporate PACs. Sorta ironic. We also know what the upcoming challenges look like. Redistricting is a huge question mark since California has an independent redistricting commission. We have to be prepared for whatever they throw at us, quite possibly a redder district. What we know for sure - we'll have thousands of new voters to talk to and thousands of new voters to register. We have to build out an aggressive field program, and we have to do it earlier than ever before. And we have to manage all this while making sure we don't miss our end of month fundraising goals. We can't do any of this vital campaign work without the money to fund it. **[For all these reasons, I'm counting on your grassroots support now more than ever. name: Team Jacobs for Congress
subject: INVEST: Defense Fund for Matt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Help us counter the attacks. Peter, The Biden Administration lost Afghanistan, and Congressional Democrats are complicit in this historic failure. One-party Democratic rule in Washington has proven disastrous – and it’s frightening to imagine what the coming months may bring. Unable to defend their record, Democrats have gone on offense – attacking political opponents instead of working with them for the good of the country. That’s why we set up a defense fund for Matt – to make sure we have the resources to counter the Far Left’s baseless attacks. That’s also why this end-of-month reporting deadline is so critical. And it’s less than one week away.

clean_body: Help us counter the attacks. Peter, The Biden Administration lost Afghanistan, and Congressional Democrats are complicit in this historic failure. One-party Democratic rule in Washington has proven disastrous – and it’s frightening to imagine what the coming months may bring. Unable to defend their record, Democrats have gone on offense – attacking political opponents instead of working with them for the good of the country. That’s why we set up a defense fund for Matt – to make sure we have the resources to counter the Far Left’s baseless attacks. That’s also why this end-of-month reporting deadline is so critical. And it’s less than one week away. Matt is a former federal prosecutor who spent years investigating and prosecuting al-Qaeda terrorists. He understands the threats we’re up against – and he has the knowledge and experience to confront them in Congress. Peter, rush reinforcements now >>
Peter --

Democrats recently announced a MAJOR strategy program they're implementing in **nine battleground states** to prepare for the midterm elections.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

clean_body: | | | | | Folks -- Let me be frank with you... Republicans want to undo everything we’ve accomplished. They can’t stand the progress we’ve made in the Silver State. From raising the minimum wage to expanding voting rights, our victories for all Nevadans scare them and their ultra-rich donors. Now, four extreme Republicans are lining up to roll back our progress and we are running out of time to ensure we have enough resources to take them on and WIN. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Together, we’ve done so much, including... Expanding healthcare Investing in schools and teachers Standing with workers Protecting renters Creating economic opportunity We’ve accomplished big things in the last two years. subject: The important lessons I learned

body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aabb9676b09948b0b49aa5890070e0b0&_e=Wg7M8IfpApaer_wBn4UeMikrqqSt4-DBLpn8EpBg-rM2cPh7o23TxtliwvgmoHc1fMOKinkZwxJvUfmsiZUaN32dv3JpwflJuAr8KjCrOPyDa9s4K6GmgL-iDVbakMw5t8NiBWvCNN7tG0fEWLXkp0NAP7fk469TkAu1fTg51Q8SP6P3xejD8Cq1_ANp_93f_YeIGAwUHCAblbgy3-eXWPHgrORp0HZ-zGjn8-09v4yADtdvhMAqqJ5mQgoNsX9VVYEqETCdZOOFVrkkN5-azcwsTlUA9PYgGv3EXs217zg_ZcBcc8XcG8GmrgWCurJMBfqcLVs8C6Kv8wm42iKk3eEivbkGSpFI3dn5ocRQ_P6iDewbzz9eR_1ezdI9CAKJ-5A6Asqq44irBNi9QQdKZSlT89PeOahujDJ9TkzUxjB5cGpTLeum7rmFKo8jJFS8R6a5Qzspzieyu9ziH3fZDkSWAoJHOzMyzr4HmaNZBEjUrLgOzoHURWVsN6FcCJBR)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aabb9676b09948b0b49aa5890070e0b0&_e=Wg7M8IfpApaer_wBn4UeMikrqqSt4-DBLpn8EpBg-rM2cPh7o23TxtliwvgmoHc1fMOKinkZwxJvUfmsiZUaN32dv3JpwflJuAr8KjCrOPyDa9s4K6GmgL-iDVbakMw5t8NiBWvCNN7tG0fEWLXkp0NAP7fk469TkAu1fTg51Q8SP6P3xejD8Cq1_ANp_93f_YeIGAwUHCAblbgy3-eXWPHgrORp0HZ-zGjn8-09v4yADtdvhMAqqJ5mQgoNsX9VVYEqETCdZOOFVrkkN5-azcwsTlUA9PYgGv3EXs217zgH1IMwkTXpdmjw-n5sSRdeZDkca5rKkqsF_7WLoKB-bbliHpnj7ya_iBRmIq6U6HptLUhZg3UaO7GW9m4AKwUxqXOnxmQOHuxXEBDaKWa8U_5uv7kaZvP204wwLKhjeAh-xR-z48wzcmjVCA9I4uhPYVuR8f_7T06G12ZejD7lhyLhQDAdeznNQvqq4Nf85DpKicuXP3nQirjfdbPq7tYc)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aabb9676b09948b0b49aa5890070e0b0&_e=Wg7M8IfpApaer_wBn4UeMikrqqSt4-DBLpn8EpBg-rM2cPh7o23TxtliwvgmoHc1fMOKinkZwxJvUfmsiZUaN32dv3JpwflJuAr8KjCrOPyDa9s4K6GmgL-iDVbakMw5t8NiBWvCNN7tG0fEWLXkp0NAP7fk469TkAu1fTg51Q8SP6P3xejD8Cq1_ANp_93f_YeIGAwUHCAblbgy3-eXWPHgrORp0HZ-zGjn8-09v4yADtdvhMAqqJ5mQgoNsX9VVYEqETCdZOOFVrkkN5-azcwsTlUA9PYgGv3EXs217ziS-f-ow6uJV_hGw0pk8NgZMizBCD1PmZ7wcK2njYTyiC-gg4upMP9GfL3Qci5nKj-814eImp8e64F3serdNmNDDJVsf24KAH6FrqvT4UFYFYZOTOVaExvE7UeLRNfvf-NDo2JIMEKUtZSVu5HHU-cxcn9uEvFk0hGz53D0O7_obSuOPH0WihROlCOmfXAERuo8B7vc4j1S_DM95HFHoRdD)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aabb9676b09948b0b49aa5890070e0b0&_e=Wg7M8IfpApaer_wBn4UeMikrqqSt4-DBLpn8EpBg-rM2cPh7o23TxtliwvgmoHc1fMOKinkZwxJvUfmsiZUaN32dv3JpwflJuAr8KjCrOPyDa9s4K6GmgL-iDVbakMw5t8NiBWvCNN7tG0fEWLXkp0NAP7fk469TkAu1fTg51Q8SP6P3xejD8Cq1_ANp_93f_YeIGAwUHCAblbgy3-eXWPHgrORp0HZ-zGjn8-09v4yADtdvhMAqqJ5mQgoNsX9VVYEqETCdZOOFVrkkN5-azcwsTlUA9PYgGv3EXs217zjgm2TWOMdIkZvHJG6Px0Nn8SyCjdsadRndKAauvSoERyJeq-nTyIoQV23HOaSSJ8oSsE-LHXrvAG1cqD4UN-f801-3X7HgNtQhNbKydb23A9A2FAiSKSWtSlKzCBmmn8hI1r5Cpw08RAE_I_VGPs4P08tAWLtoMH7z5s3nzQ0M1wiifJEiDQs8mPmyLrm_E66-OlCyPicQa97s8DIUKq5p) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=aabb9676b09948b0b49aa5890070e0b0&_e=Wg7M8IfpApaer_wBn4UeMikrqqSt4-DBLpn8EpBg-rM2cPh7o23TxtliwvgmoHc1fMOKinkZwxJvUfmsiZUaN32dv3JpwflJuAr8KjCrOPyDa9s4K6GmgL-iDVbakMw5t8NiBWvCNN7tG0fEWLXkp0NAP7fk469TkAu1fTg51Q8SP6P3xejD8Cq1_ANp_93f_YeIGAwUHCAblbgy3-eXWPHgrORp0HZ-zGjn8-09v4yADtdvhMAqqJ5mQgoNsX9VVYEqETCdZOOFVrkkN5-azcwsTlUA9PYgGv3EXs217zgqrUsByHfBP27DGADWQlFV4rGjKZg4Goaha32l-y5BTRfs5vEpMGCCwYn8IwOh6doY4BgJ-UwE-vDJJwpeOSF6baq7eivZ-S46lG98aNC4NRg0WLOojnQDs4HT6NLsfGU2zMtsYac2SfteJ-9dHzQjbPx5Fe1gKU9nzBzwKLbBKdrOYsafjrEcs7KhwRajtXJFhJsIc5reuICNOHSnldcQ)

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Fellow Conservative, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: New Executive Director
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
Peter,
We are excited to announce that we've hired a new Executive Director, Brit Bender!
A third generation Tennessean, Memphis native, and University of Tennessee graduate, Brit most recently served as the Iowa State Director for NextGen America. Her work on local, state, and national campaigns has allowed her to sharpen her skills and develop an innovative approach to engaging and mobilizing voters. The experience that she will bring to her role as Executive Director will enable the TNDP to make great strides in growing our voter base, convening statewide stakeholders, developing substantial political programing, and supporting Democratic candidates and campaigns.
“For me, serving as the TNDP Executive Director is personal. I've seen enough of the destructive Republican extremism in my home state, and I'm committed to returning home and bringing the change this state desperately needs. Working on campaigns, I learned a principle to not discount ourselves and the incredible things we're capable of achieving. It's time to stop discounting our Southern states, especially Tennessee. We're going to be employing new tactics and organizing every day to support Democrats and Tennesseans across the state. Better days are on the horizon in Tennessee." – Brit Bender
Brit will be joining the TNDP’s already strong staff consisting of mostly women, all in leadership positions. This is another fulfillment of the TNDP’s commitment to bolstering the presence of women in politics.
Building Back Blue,
Hendrell Remus
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden Turns His Back On Responsibility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=41541be35f8941bd8015292446c3bae6&_e=_riSZsthX7ZF7HSf3PLrEQqAIVKGVxT2-Lw19SOPJOJFr3A7fzIj6E0xvb3ZptIGd5ork4zeypwY6HyMVLG2uehuxzDounpfOhLXzXvewJJASkj5ZF_ucK6nGZCAS4Yala7ixq0w0tcPCUQtNIybuzbgcITjkFTGQBRbXFaYf4qRkZziz-27uOfV4Dt2NnkaDwHEgy9bCRHJr_f0UCoquPEsQUXRJH4Vj2hrdxtwM51GXpEIiZ8N9Y7zzfJUYTTisRwOolQ9Y7zqQO7GD0IhQbw-2bPM9pBdnJZnJ_7zBS3oPJL0EyzZd3FAapF6Z5HhWZBMnvGi9rTF-k-C-jn3RDwntbiYpRghRVHM3DVigGC8zyf81hswR6eRy3aqm_dfql6f9MH9mrBvLOLQwiftQkc1fqWBJfNX7Rfjmt6d9HI%3D) | |
---
Peter,
What has unfolded over the last week on the global stage has confirmed that Joe Biden is a dangerously inept leader.

Last week, he ignored phone calls from America’s closest allies, and briefly interrupted his vacation to deliver superficial remarks in which he danced around the issue of his botched withdrawal from Afghanistan.

He took no questions from the press, and headed straight back to vacation — **THAT’S NOT LEADERSHIP**.

| | Friend,

August is National Water Quality Month, and with the Southwest and West confronting a severe water crisis, **it’s more critical than ever that we protect our nation’s greatest freshwater treasure — our Great Lakes.**

Millions of people rely on the water resources of the Great Lakes for drinking water, work, and leisure -- including our region’s local economy; the Great Lakes generate over $60 billion in wages every year.

**Ensuring that all Americans have access to clean drinking water is a top priority of mine. That’s why I’m working hard in Congress to ensure the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative (GLRI) is fully funded and meeting the enormous needs of our region.** President Trump wanted to eliminate this program. Working in a bipartisan manner, and with the help of supporters like you, we were able to save this essential program.

**[Friend, I will never stop fighting to protect the Great Lakes. Can you chip in $15 to help me keep this seat in Congress so we can continue our fight to protect the Great Lakes?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKkSubMmYhPlkyEMD_vQ5lxjdbsYCn6Uzfm_W_NQIoMXox7yDH3aywCYkV6gQ6wuKgQOPOGX-CXNIVbPe1wcNcIxLZU0DZ3Nv_GdjHqIBOCC9c3nE1ea0HiCLs2Rq5IyTm281EC1FRsy9aoA7UP0CITtNMmINthmQh6CH08obc8K44AELnIzjG3PP3Ou8IFCkvoeeon-t7_3m67DexpSEY3dMgpt61yc9p28HrErm4Zo7mt8VysJGZ7x8mO9vhUm4mn1YCX5uTT9fRDkb3AZEb9-CIPm-te2_LrSCXcU9ThFIW5JMT6zvb2pA-56stKTxgp3AGN_Y3ZUzk5xr-tHN0t-FiMp8XdKw_dK_rNUDvDfpWXOF-H_0VZFxTCkgkQXF0Cn9tEYvNJvw0MOhBcg1f82TiBRGfwJP3Yoq6QWcCCKg/3er/vKBEOhl3Sg-PTWiFQQciCg/h1/2H1DBBEk6czobwK839hIt5P3IJXn0FOucBLLq8ccYGM)**

The GLRI has already made extraordinary progress by removing contaminants from 17 sites and working to mitigate toxic effects at six areas of concern. **But as heat waves and droughts intensify -- and freshwater contamination grows rampant -- the Lakes continue to be at risk.**

**We need to do everything in our power to protect our freshwater, our ecosystem, and the people who depend on this vital resource.**

As a member of the Great Lakes Task Force, I am fighting to secure the robust federal investments needed to continue protecting our Great Lakes, and the drinking water for millions of Americans. **[Can you chip in $15 to help send me back to Congress so I can continue fighting for policies that ensure a sustainable future for the Great Lakes?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKkSubMmYhPlkyEMD_vQ5lxjdbsYCn6Uzfm_W_NQIoMXox7yDH3aywCYkV6gQ6wuKgQOPOGX-CXNIVbPe1wcNcIrG_6ybJyz-vMyW9wnbiEFQnOWlfAlm8G_a0-1UkMYK57PElwKnkEP1zKVwK9y4_uUz4uDLk3K8pHWWofxiifaBnaJeWm_5oYDiLKZdvSPKlD7mtqnRPNwFU9QUFjAAF-rJX26mN-CVY0NUNEK84rNDE7UeXGgqBYRYXmtd8RZjRTeU8iF9payDIoRgfzOkUUEd0DUOE6mVO6CRYi_Tz2qjUT5fXTHRY9Ax9cwJrON6ktHglCisvYFGMl5TmD2Lv6NUkT0yNauLaMBj_tcPOe_mtw27H-hVyuY8ucTK_EjDyfk_H6pcZpW9274B_FO1eQkmkRxvwROD99LJW3s_tTQA/3er/vKBEOhl3Sg-PTWiFQQciCg/h3/IppdA-UR8RxdvWEN9WUjETfVYvQY3fmFBPoaSw25SNI)**

clean_body: Protecting the source of drinking water for over 30 million Americans | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, August is National Water Quality Month, and with the Southwest and West confronting a severe water crisis, it’s more critical than ever that we protect our nation’s greatest freshwater treasure — our Great Lakes. Millions of people rely on the water resources of the Great Lakes for drinking water, work, and leisure -- including our region’s local economy; the Great Lakes generate over $60 billion in wages every year. Ensuring that all Americans have access to clean drinking water is a top priority of mine. That’s why I’m working hard in Congress to ensure the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative (GLRI) is fully funded and meeting the enormous needs of our region. President Trump wanted to eliminate this program. Working in a bipartisan manner, and with the help of supporters like you, we were able to save this essential program. | The GLRI has already made extraordinary progress by removing contaminants from 17 sites and working to mitigate toxic effects at six areas of concern. But as heat waves and droughts intensify -- and freshwater contamination grows rampant -- the Lakes continue to be at risk. We need to do everything in our power to protect our freshwater, our ecosystem, and the people who depend on this vital resource. As a member of the Great Lakes Task Force, I am fighting to secure the robust federal investments needed to continue protecting our Great Lakes, and the drinking water for millions of Americans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, \-- Marcy Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. Fellow Conservative,

Quick thank you before I cut to the chase of this email. I didn’t have any expectations of raising six figures in campaign contributions when I launched my campaign for Congress back in May.

To say that you’ve blown me away is an understatement.

I sincerely hope you’re in this with me for the long haul, because if you’ve been reading my emails regularly, you’ll know that the district in which I’m running, Virginia’s 7th, is going to play host to one of the most expensive House races in the nation. **I know it’s annoying to ask for money more than 14 months ahead of Election Day, but the truth is that this race could attract more than $10 million in spending.**

_Why?_

**Because the Democrat I’m running against really shouldn’t even hold the office she’s occupying in the first place. Virginia’s 7th district is a Republican district that she won in a less-than-stellar year for Republicans nationwide.**

[**You can help me flip this seat back into our column, effectively flipping the House in one fell swoop. If I flip this district, the House is all but sure to go Republican.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=9da6d23aeb6c46acaf9698e53ee62971&_e=1LuxpBvkSjBEOzB6O_2CbLjjlFuuoyFA-pCtOhmZPM3p8e9X87bt6A1f4ALQ56q7EIzKJz_wWlKnJTeNCBFXbpwdTvU5weFYYo6ch6U_Mbg7UAfOtjsSOAafnKy8p5Y0I3H5BfRfg5lbLS2S3in3PqigjbU5SyMozZjEuxwZVJOzr1ePRc4dvefXy0TfYpDqxYOLTUXh3fFcZ18JO3tH_P0gE91yqLsdsfhXK4XHfgRD_li3MZaQgJyPqOgkauAotduQQuPdnMXK-4WGxgHTuOocESu2ARqv9nEKK79NlXY5ClO02VIsuJf09rhd0ynvV0HbgKQuTh7NcYeY2DLTsPaxBJRO9vrOR0pIlpHN331dFPRoFlP4_PPjzuHZkt4kUGEtmh-ilfoh3Nza6pblRBppRj1Bn9-gXdV7kK5LcLkQLEvYZtdvvcZfXzYpIlQY_SL5cph2u0aJ5md1PVBipS8T0jXtmmpY-jkLaFccGEs%3D)

My team and I really hoping to make a big splash when we announce our 3rd quarter fundraising numbers at the end of September – with the intention of warding off any potential rivals for the Republican nomination – so, [**hitting our goal in August is just as important as hitting our goal in September.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=9da6d23aeb6c46acaf9698e53ee62971&_e=1LuxpBvkSjBEOzB6O_2CbLjjlFuuoyFA-pCtOhmZPM3p8e9X87bt6A1f4ALQ56q7EIzKJz_wWlKnJTeNCBFXbpwdTvU5weFYYo6ch6U_Mbg7UAfOtjsSOAafnKy8p5Y0I3H5BfRfg5lbLS2S3in3PqigjbU5SyMozZjEuxwZVJOzr1ePRc4dvefXy0TfYpDqxYOLTUXh3fFcZ18JO3tH_P0gE91yqLsdsfhXK4XHfgRD_li3MZaQgJyPqOgkauAotduQQuPdnMXK-4WGxgHTuGvu2RCW8DJQlo1t17MQBvgwPAhILh0-fJjlc1l18y9GUpNLto3g5qgjOcX3RZts0ScgVDe-K9kfcwt5xMH88W7oXqqoKLHskmM4XXILK0doo2whKOs-G2Xig0rDa-8r1t5V4WlJTj8R2-gf6ieCgTg1CHHaJYPB6MuQ5TWTgktGFe5aKQNkxQTeRnm_gKsAByedSa3pRDZOCP8hA9wen_0%3D)

**We’re hoping to raise an additional $5k over the next week, and to that end if you’re able to help me out with a donation of just $1 or more, I’d be so grateful.**

[**Flipping the House happens one dollar at a time. Please chip-in what you can today!**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=9da6d23aeb6c46acaf9698e53ee62971&_e=1LuxpBvkSjBEOzB6O_2CbLjjlFuuoyFA-pCtOhmZPM3p8e9X87bt6A1f4ALQ56q7EIzKJz_wWlKnJTeNCBFXbpwdTvU5weFYYo6ch6U_Mbg7UAfOtjsSOAafnKy8p5Y0I3H5BfRfg5lbLS2S3in3PqigjbU5SyMozZjEuxwZVJOzr1ePRc4dvefXy0TfYpDqxYOLTUXh3fFcZ18JO3tH_P0gE91yqLsdsfhXK4XHfgRD_li3MZaQgJyPqOgkauAotduQQuPdnMXK-4WGxgHTuKBWWajz09_1a2rjCWY93qC0r7Mwblrfjwna51OfJxda65eBfgwUMYHXeglpJKaL0t_uZ_8Gsr3DhOvdXgiNhBmbSmNlv_0IxIQKkRPynh2Pmi5mww_rCsRc8oPe8bBMlUKNm_1rDpY0_C1o-frALqundlsAEEQxDwYGFMqh61JySvuPwFryDMH-77W5mnRqlsXMsyx9DfBOxKCbYYou2BY%3D)

Thank you for your support.

John Castorani

name: Reform Wisconsin Education
subject: America’s future is in our students’ hands. Let’s start acting like it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
Our kids already lost an entire year of valuable in-person learning in 2020. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=dffe26d414284881ae6921b241936b02&_e=jH_W9R5qBKxnWtB3O7gPKJMIK_vlI-_-XmjZdqk6-tZt6A5eyw1HRdXS7QI8fTqGvAUYYadFfLpQ7e9oiBLzmLbqXcm69pOfUQsCMpiAStpIoxQHGUrNl_Qn5g3whjv5uESDrkyeGdyb4yt53DYFwBrx3Lq8QnWe3qMob9huQf0GLAM-Md0tVqM5cctz6ao1r2oybXyE5r7PjQPbU5NLOoXcbH3xfYofAV1DLtk-A-4BgYIv4w3BBjFP27IteiPPpL5iRcb8Ji9_kIgCyFsbx9T3CempQf50TOqJJjvPadyXf-JucUa52eHGlH_v5-EeqVolhWdkudZUTqnbxT_in9kvm36E4K-eOLUuHA8losok7uHJqpKRnDInxN0YJ0FkcxlTP8UF28WozV9alW1l81PoglNRzS6P9BsuY1pgT0rl2L3lXXPW3asI7RrfQBPOBA4Khu4KAo_DyKKrIL0x8U4K7Hwue0JG6meIEnsdMOc%3D) Peter, America’s future is in the hands of our students –– and that future is in jeopardy because schools are **_failing_** to prepare them for the challenges that lie ahead. _Our kids already lost an entire year of valuable in-person learning in 2020._ _They’re falling even further behind now that schools are taking time away from math and science to push ridiculous hyper-political “woke” subjects._ **This should concern every one of us because it affects every one of us. That’s why Congressman Gallagher has stepped up with an****eight-step plan****to reform Wisconsin’s schools by 2030.** | |
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=dffe26d414284881ae6921b241936b02&_e=jH_W9R5qBKxnWtB3O7gPKJMIK_vlI-_-XmjZdqk6-tZt6A5eyw1HRdXS7QI8fTqGvAUYYadFfLpQ7e9oiBLzmLbqXcm69pOfUQsCMpiAStpIoxQHGUrNl_Qn5g3whjv5uESDrkyeGdyb4yt53DYFwBrx3Lq8QnWe3qMob9huQf0GLAM-Md0tVqM5cctz6ao1r2oybXyE5r7PjQPbU5NLOoXcbH3xfYofAV1DLtk-A-4BgYIv4w3BBjFP27IteiPPSYSOthnq8RZ_iw-trHkfuoRnjH9KitZ-_ph2fu5j_5e1x1J-yksgtIGtCwLSmn8O4HfAGAerwOM9TEEV0GQbepbl7KvLca722MXISyReGNTnL2R1n6dWPUf-Mp-Mb4RzYPm3df6zh3UK8OKZzThVB69aaN8XXuz_ghJXOC0StGFC7zH-7y5-Dn2zU07900CFPL_1rpPgJqxj6TFwiXkK9-byzd8XugvDyTnUfOKlCvE%3D)
|
---
Here are the smart, conservative reforms that, if implemented, will get our schools and students on the path to prosperity:

* Return to science-backed methods of teaching reading.
* Improve incentives to keep A+ teachers in the classroom.
* Fund all school choices equitably.
* Make smart investments in rural broadband.
* Inform parents of school quality through a Yelp-like system.
* Hold school board elections on the general Election Day.
* Modernize technical colleges and the way students can pay for them.
* Establish 529 savings accounts for blue-collar apprenticeships.

[**I SUPPORT THIS PLAN**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=dffe26d414284881ae6921b241936b02&_e=jH_W9R5qBKxnWtB3O7gPKJMIK_vlI-_-XmjZdqk6-tZt6A5eyw1HRdXS7QI8fTqGvAUYYadFfLpQ7e9oiBLzmLbqXcm69pOfUQsCMpiAStpIoxQHGUrNl_Qn5g3whjv5uESDrkyeGdyb4yt53DYFwBrx3Lq8QnWe3qMob9huQf0GLAM-Md0tVqM5cctz6ao1r2oybXyE5r7PjQPbU5NLOoXcbH3xfYofAV1DLtk-A-4BgYIv4w3BBjFP27IteiPPBsTX3zTJhLjsgaK0_i0H0JONl0IjFf3ZjiLUnhTLfN-uJiO4NlWANVTLeKNrZCY_H5x4yXV9qL_O_n21uq20eddp0m2h5seAM82OsB9MBnOrvIlJ29fqNrsWewks3G2in1L41viSYeWlUcP38-onvulAPp-lKzpSDvRlVa18-gUlCyuOAaLvJSanSQX-5FrsWPWv-YJrcPj37hl5bYzEmp2NF1hbPA2Lpde0ae1fYyM%3D)
it won’t be easy –– but with your support here and at the ballot box, we can implement these practical steps by 2030. _Mike is fighting for these changes because America’s future depends on it, and we hope that you’ll join him today by_[** _signing our petition here >>>_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=dffe26d414284881ae6921b241936b02&_e=jH_W9R5qBKxnWtB3O7gPKJMIK_vlI-_-XmjZdqk6-tZt6A5eyw1HRdXS7QI8fTqGvAUYYadFfLpQ7e9oiBLzmLbqXcm69pOfUQsCMpiAStpIoxQHGUrNl_Qn5g3whjv5uESDrkyeGdyb4yt53DYFwBrx3Lq8QnWe3qMob9huQf0GLAM-Md0tVqM5cctz6ao1r2oybXyE5r7PjQPbU5NLOoXcbH3xfYofAV1DLtk-A-4BgYIv4w3BBjFP27IteiPPREsiyPQ0WBlqHKGOw3jdzf7PBWI8UBC9fcj4uLQtt03HROHHYpHn6gmA2Vio0pomkn4NLmtyOcN37RUFm4SwB--Pbw47A3jqFYr0ItCAtB0n_CXUamf2d27f1f-bkEDZCphGePEbbXWwW1aZkiFm_qiva8meC2doTl9neXuUdaNNqBxn165xGSb3mwfAvvRnNEVo3VBfIQJL6XI3JCB6zMmAPop-RcUYTFuoWSY9VzE%3D)

Thank you,
Team Gallagher

clean_body: Our kids already lost an entire year of valuable in-person learning in 2020. Peter, America’s future is in the hands of our students –– and that future is in jeopardy because schools are failing to prepare them for the challenges that lie ahead. Our kids already lost an entire year of valuable in-person learning in 2020. They’re falling even further behind now that schools are taking time away from math and science to push ridiculous hyper-political “woke” subjects. This should concern every one of us because it affects every one of us. That’s why Congressman Gallagher has stepped up with aneight-step planto reform Wisconsin’s schools by 2030. | | | Here are the smart, conservative reforms that, if implemented, will get our schools and students on the path to prosperity: Return to science-backed methods of teaching reading. Improve incentives to keep A+ teachers in the classroom. Fund all school choices equitably. Make smart investments in rural broadband. Inform parents of school quality through a Yelp-like system. Hold school board elections on the general Election Day. Modernize technical colleges and the way students can pay for them. Establish 529 savings accounts for blue-collar apprenticeships. it won’t be easy –– but with your support here and at the ballot box, we can implement these practical steps by 2030. Mike is fighting for these changes because America’s future depends on it, and we hope that you’ll join him today by Thank you, Team Gallagher | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: [WATCH] personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189924:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58189925:JYJzRglWN:m:1:3253819041:F74B24951111BAA123CB6ED1F8EBEF20:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

**Jan. 6 investigation seeks phone records related to attack**
_\- Politico_
* * *

Quick update, friend.

Kevin McCarthy continues to undermine the investigation into the Jan. 6th insurrection. But one thing Kevin can't hide is his phone records from that day. Investigators just announced they will seek out phone calls between some Republicans -- possibly even between McCarthy and Trump.

Needless to say, McCarthy is fuming in the press and sounds like a man with something to hide. We're ratcheting the pressure up and reminding voters that McCarthy is a complete hypocrite on January 6th. First he supported the investigation, then flip-flopped to shield Donald Trump from any accountability.

**It's cowardly, and as Marisa always says, standing for what's right starts at the top. That's a big reason why she's taking this fight to the highest levels of the GOP.**

Peter, that’s why I need your help. In the midst of a brutal pandemic, the stress of working from home, job insecurity, childcare burdens and _so much more_ , working families need a break.

**A 32-hour workweek will change the way Americans live and work for the better.**

_And Peter, it's proven to work!_ There is hard evidence to prove that productivity actually increases with a 32-hour workweek, while simultaneously allowing working families crucial time to breathe.

[**Peter, can I count on you to stand up and demand a 32-hour workweek to help working families? Add your name immediately! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34661357/302673045/-1403770352?refcode=MTFC_20210825_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRkYzI3OC1mZTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YmY0Y2IiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIkz_iqL63tF1EcyO0OZ96ijibS2g1Vo34miv9tmKD8=&emci=9b77d85a-d305-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=11ddc278-fe05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&ceid=18839602)

body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | Fellow Patriot,

I need to make sure you saw my email. Democrats continue to fail us:
* The disaster in Afghanistan
* Soaring prices nationwide
* A wide-open border

The list goes on and on. I’m demanding real leadership from the Biden administration and Democrats.

[**Check out more about why I’m running and what I think this country needs.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBDQIWqtssFznNwrXysxQmpg0EkBRg8YsH9AsiPiGuRe0uXa6BfmLK0vKEL3QEM9kwpu4uP_IU0ALfXzVWjEEVkTcKQ-IWMA4CBiPDg_zCy9DuJyqBngDvKqWdAai8dRssYtl0gZovM4b-fUCRZrAtiVnShPgybVlF4Ff8oyC4Zeo05dHA_Tg0zt4TWOWAE2Z2DkA6ulyd4fQlyOi1rhnDAr)

Thanks,
Tyler Kistner

* * *

**From:** Tyler Kistner
**Date:** Wednesday, August 4, 2021
**Subject:** My Why

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBB7jO4S1vLil0V8NKX76Uvb9XLLKcF7IKrd_jFflj-KXVjWVxfeukQzm6pqsRw7nqWA3hOByrPrHVLT426jHI6aLidhFIc9jZE5K2Urr0qO8lgi00UHMzmdKa-Zwpt4LYsnupl3xvbuUsatf7YKZ0KHf7brmE7A6uQEITjH50nR69XF7FUfdJjdrESzVIuJHVi1mtd1m5iuJQFs5X8zQMkg)

---
Fellow Patriot,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, [**I knew I had to run for Congress**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBBkiu7AiANGRR9YOyrCTF2DvLs4jdsyfMT-449M6_4X80UDGNntbdSVMdx-fEF8MzPbbCgqNPd_mJ0CY_O6VXojXlEnPEeNni0Ou5zVIjAUs_dffhG1s3QzCH2Wc0HGcuBnBDyKGiACeIQSszI7p94h46AYjBJK8fgPmYS07QC9EcTyvWTQRDdcW9jhlG0hNyfOMRNsdoQ8Eph5TGst3-Gl) because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[**Watch more about why I’m running and my story, here.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBBi1TA_-1uVQS0GPjcgzjk1ooVnLq0e_crqxgBMpuY3wcCmVUst1Gb2Z26ORMpA-2jTGb2xN2o325t5fvvQctcUStYxkzLo7xl0FQS_CTLISk2uWFwzyGtpDmrEcur-c78P3cOve8TDJFb5n4ugfm6jcXMORXV4_9zkb6VLx8A2H1cBeB4Jk2_kwtIlw7UZN2ouAS5r3Ftk_353Z76lFNlD)

[** ****WATCH NOW ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBDXl8N1O2DcYep-R48P1BKO5jf_fS_njsNK3NB4RmsSGMVwKp20DD-ufcAkEEk0ZcvYguG6os92VSMgwp3Ui0EflTB9mYJI0BLXRZyLPWNXoUTdEWzB0TflEgg9efYRbnmvw3G1PuxDMo0OUi3UJJKW-qlb6WeXfqkW3wMUV5o6aDhtalmFQgEoozWwVJlbROx9VOnFRHVcYzXGS2Eq_jk-)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBCesCFEnsaYvmrMTaW9qn_pdLKmWWyAThQmyIzWMmx4Fa4baHQ96Ydiria2si_MFwtKlCibxdhYC8etljdRxl-43YlB8HmH3izhy3fb7VdidGU4f6r1RP7lcEBwC3aRid-PKf2PYr6CGWCRkV2ufdrvpUa1p6cXHYCkX3DvxoO2V_MlLG9FUdjOq8KmzguVqdedy5UWRXwHexx2aGTlSk2U)

When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current ‘leaders’ have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**. I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBBO-N6w7jdSCuVLNvs0eWCrpaay6EyVmOZuuI0eUtwb3Yh_WoeROIgl-v0BHpbkORz21L2WVQeOhRguOfPfkGSUrWxdskCKvGpTi9aXwA7X8O8IpJI0uO7QX4nNeOkjU55zj2ud09EKa-KQd16k2cs0hs7flr1CVE7s6Iu2pAAsI0JNxSWiwbwmLqvOXE9pYJySoa5rdzU3A3S7-_41l9nH)

Let’s take our country back.

[**Please share your thoughts with me on the situation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBCrZSaFwLeYBlM0raZV8moeXDNcmUNNLax8D-cc5DBfgAf9nM03bxykysg_scT247TnyXJLZJeeENj0JyGT7chPqc1vVKecye1J8uvY0Q5NUke1VpWTspDABPdCjftXG2p47iIcAqMADavvrQmiT20shVEeVAj_r3SVwbRIFnNF972FEzk2Uzt5nEUuJ7kR4z7SjvkoX3tbBJTaL72Gi7Vd)

In Service,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBBvL6vNzryETYurt4VajINzZMKoqcIcUZsmZJ7RezrKYuxyzvKiccgzxoL9iAdHNpC8znUkjZLR9dQsXFu_tlK-OP46DHxFBuubkHTOzF3NsyeKrih-qpCNivBw4-BsjvNhK2exkb4SAg95hWYC4XoGPuMR77Z_lN0UiPG3GGw8Y8pZ0auSG--jX9j0o_cJ1MfuuXZyLG4UMSeiuX5aYr7S)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine Veteran.

[** ****WATCH NOW ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b33dbd1e89d46b487f561ff22c2850d&_e=Nh61DkUlnW0m3xp1bhkNA4R-FgtwY7LDau5Xeyno01TzA9bNyV1T3nGWsO0k-arzigMoKFMqTO6AR49KCZAa8dwDNm9Z6lA58MOH-LZajZxbipT7BoDq16llao4tGX0dnrE1HSTPtka3aIabcik6FERIEAulMFD-suHlMYXxsBCm2PQRxMuL0nwtbmI6pa4R_uyKRTEExfzYeflZPr4_4KLC4aF5Nbg7Px_SBu6uOdYicNSCCzsjDWyqZmLQ1FaC6gWeGuwqiD4vmwlnqn58kvf8-zWzvCFqZhHeW3V537RoglJIU1IOyzfxuINcTXdb8XRNnJn8iRN6ykXC86m2ZHj_tjmV-1g4molYEEZ5CNZ_CUdbwp0EiveFWmQxADBo)

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: We deserve better leadership in the White House →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | Sign my letter now! |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/1m71534PjRa6EU2k4w1I/wv)
---|---
| | | [ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/11ArjlDLqT0rMQheSvKPkCD)
---
| | **Friend, ** **It wasn’t too long ago we were PROUD of our President for the many accomplishments he made on behalf of the American people. Donald Trump put**America first** , strengthened relationships with allies abroad, and always made sure our enemies feared us. ** **While I continue to believe in the resilience of the American people, I’m not nearly as confident in the leadership of President Biden and his Administration. ** **President Biden has failed us time and time again since taking office. Whether it is his disastrous decisions that led to the crisis in Afghanistan, his open border policies that have caused a humanitarian crisis at the border, or his wreckless overspending that is causing record breaking prices for goods and services.... It all boils down to one thing. ** ****We DESERVE better leadership!**** **I miss the days of turning on the news and hearing former President Trump tout a record breaking economy, all-time low unemployment, historic peace deals in the Middle East... the list goes on. **
****If you agree,[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/11AruRZ4wdfiYWr0YDdVzyA)**[_join me right NOW_](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/11ArGoknBxuab2AN4KH1Oux)**in signing our letter demanding better leadership from the White House.****
---
[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/11As3r0ZMbXSzeUlgZDeimr)
| | **Thank you for your continued support,** **Jim Inhofe**
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
---
PO Box 13300

Oklahoma City, OK 73113
| [ ]()
---

I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2J9R4u_n9hX-rx9m8MCF74Kwtr_DZD9wn9ZJ5Pds5tryplKbCkKaVsC-QqFmYBhnKkISBGknGR8M_t5OgkAy-V4UbPXQFPcClmoJF1KNZPMsUTmkPPq5ldFE63Qc6aVyoeVtb02_cEnnnGnUM7av4vBvicOg_7HEw0nvxP0YvMvmnS9cwF2JZJ4sRAUaf9nr62z4ZK7ukQ1tL60nRHYXHShQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2JdlpHkDwU7NEPhPOd2v_H-gJK_e-UEZQinrz7STW4yc9TGeZajaUL6niApFTkbq5exqjm77ovB-QK88YEdcjhw36WnzLL7ObceVV7i7azixt3Gah0_FEijQ40x0f4Uz68FVm8thpTMxrR0RRcimfciUQhHNHzIPFSufClvq-raH9-IFCwS2pwY3hEi5kOr7KROpYl6MCar87h2LoBA92SBQ%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2J3PPYZV0nNHRtmVxOiru0XeZsgkvizcxA7Xf5c5mbUYTzEUQpHM-VTTWXcZZWWA0Rk8N7EmejcRO87i_SH7l9gZK26lHc2-ynfyVDQsNtENzTVD3eW1r2oaS5Q2NdvlFsFbKzL-rJp7NYGQiXqSlFa-reNRJtk182_CSYMepCcG82j38LlAxiO7jXouUapYPZ6kncgj_nbMRyqD5BM5qrGA%3D%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2JCF9_F-Zy71DPPLagHF0sTCdEwtqQw7KIRDzbJx2JSIcnmbEUW7J5Iy0ODLfKlCnTUy32vPg7-_TAECOL5GxprKIdqTBMTF5eiQI-crzdt_k2quebOTWTlISIKgYGw85t12obV8h1rqlprUbXos1qtawUhRB5a0Lhrz7HBZIboOCg5VRUUunsja7fY9023NfSIiU0LuoQH3b7mtvIMUhkmw%3D%3D) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2JE-Z5iail1eMzgNyvF_ClgpHSfzQhtHAbH-o_R6k7sRn4qXvBXaxb7G7Vqq2yWlZYzLfZoFSGljKJaU14c_DN4FyqD2EaeKA2MxrNgXtt19FDZ4XhjkYkYJp6mlNzfQ70TEBvGbZ7Ap9ylej3l0XybN7Z7rBF0SUAEng-Hzk_TaiXGoqM04zPayw07wO2bmVMkpjmiMk68Ipggt_obzYaJA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2JKZJ_m64P18sawu5PMsQooSUZ5sAkSrAiB5r6zw9T_C3FI8m7QcVf2CyxnA5dfhPlKc7_ILv6VAy88tyzpvwSqu4OnjwiGkBrrG1GHHf2mrwDg3U8dIInADo_rUvziqKDonPp0Yz9N6904BOllNeaKn1TfGZ0LwBxeFWShzmr9dNCp1kcEy-Z1ZbX3HqRk-eEj9hWWdnSQkHnLdoZYLCyaA%3D%3D)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4dfc13989d84c2b98e904b6025078b9&_e=H0zZu57mJZnosp1A-9BAskHlFCtlaILjg0OnRCUauMpylwZoFYyHoo9OdoDyGbh71VAwUSW63-DUJ6RCmYM7rNdFu0kWYd02z3snJ5qrn9rXreF8QMvTePoc6F5ebOxsP-MDKwrS79Rk6h76Yq85QE6oX07yvDUR2uFAI6upGbvqRiV6FqaVjE9pYk49LqSC8TQnLkQApzandfelrd_0knCmWs2pDTd3jlxLrhJGOkC-jg5MdRAtLBX83WMGJFliE5XdcgOCzC-QDCffZBXieKR4s3TFfVDPrp_4a7eXG2XP02QpIbZAvTXn5kcSct2JtO2dbYW4mCqi5dPGlQT49ezbCnmQLVZNTyzJs3_-w9TT7HNVD2W_VZUu7X7r9SRRhuWY9qT39H6Og3Ulxt9XxqWaUVUy03_qCVAjs5w5JBsW7Xv3stKO2wHcWQtHDtN8kmiFi_bnTSUga_tddafal5T5uP-9ANtz7lGy42f0sSQwr56z3ImAoHJZ1_w12YuP6xfH7Xs-KnJIw48vcZxz5g%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

How scared are Democrats of Alabama conservative Mo Brooks? Scared enough that they’re selling “No Mo Bullsh**” stickers and t-shirts.

Here’s the truth: **Mo Brooks is a Trump-supporting, unapologetic conservative** who stands up to the liberals and the Establishment in Washington.

That’s why **President Trump endorsed Mo Brooks** for the open Alabama Senate seat, and that’s why **Trump just went to Alabama to hold one of his famous rallies.** Trump showed the crowd that he was fully behind Mo Brooks — **[will you show your support for Trump and his pick Mo Brooks with an urgent grassroots donation today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a011628193664d3da051b69174a51c1b&_e=80HNJ-ZUhOO86exqymdX45E-7I1uJ1FkScUU8MfmnuW2CyZWv8ZnK5dRcaXVZJX0G6Kaf0R7LVOgqoGynrXsYR6eFasNpdK6QJMuNYqCD7ED7daZZ-9lUA-Thg2iahr1Et3fr9PUQUJ3hGbIF6sJ4-P5TK4Apv7D7TdSIdbRFGKxaq54FQGXUiuWBS0DRY1yE2LlGP_9qNbyocsYm4QnjluL-goHyxD3I58kukJ202-hzZzyDo489nszYyUYJob__HHXJxp_EiHIF8xriD09KETzvKj7u_Xo76Es2DUR-owsefcoDaabOlmzgpS9fv_r)**

clean_body: Here’s the truth: Mo Brooks is a Trump-supporting, unapologetic conservative who stands up to the liberals and the Establishment in Washington. | Dear Friend, How scared are Democrats of Alabama conservative Mo Brooks? Scared enough that they’re selling “No Mo Bullsh” stickers and t-shirts. Here’s the truth: Mo Brooks is a Trump-supporting, unapologetic conservative who stands up to the liberals and the Establishment in Washington. That’s why President Trump endorsed Mo Brooks for the open Alabama Senate seat, and that’s why Trump just went to Alabama to hold one of his famous rallies. Trump showed the crowd that he was fully behind Mo Brooks — Democrats know Mo Brooks will be an unstoppable force in the U.S. Senate against their socialist agenda – that’s why they’re terrified. And that’s why we need to do everything in our power to make sure Mo Brooks wins the Alabama Senate race. Thank you in advance for your support. Helping to elect Mo Brooks will help Republicans reclaim their Majority and send Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the socialist gang packing. body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XjCqXrrLwF4bH2kWsIavZ-KZg1buc-ZLPImHX61k0IgyphFb3wzXGeTxBiljj927wkJmu3fhINfvBDCZhihfaypU28lr3SIjC_sbzGku4OsGjai2W9snbTc44Yh7JPUmSRmjWyHkhmXzPvOaore47xT4kgkD4uOSkIWaXdTVpHEGalV18BNc1BsHOx0mHbhiTZiDI2oM3YLm1lEd_y0O2X4z2ZT-cYmEzti-7_tNz22H2jZURAi8p7r716EtfHuN5kVrvyv-vXnt1h2lENraYSCbUg4b3gWSRkLdfeqmkNuG/3er/f7I3-oRtRD-L46zLQSJzcA/h0/JTwqrAL4CmnTlXmTWRilivgp8jBBCkknq1Z9EPkxri4)
Derek, we’ll be honest: we weren’t expecting this.

**One of our self-funding Republican opponents is blanketing the airwaves with $10 million in ads** \-- with a lot of that cash coming from his own pockets. It’s clear the GOP thinks they can buy Ohio’s open Senate seat.

We didn't expect Tim’s opponents to spend this much money this early. They know this seat is one of the most competitive races this cycle -- so if we want to flip it blue, we need to match their early investments.

**[Can you split a $25 donation between Common Good VA and our Rapid Response Fund to help us fight back against these ads?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XvZqXH18YoPnNQJtdOQxET3WLLf36EvteCJurlCy2vp4VE3GU6UpVdHEWoyS2MqP2D6_AuFLE-oPJ-77tRE3Nb8W4FLbiq_203zdntU4yX5HKf0TrcMxp4lt7EwplpdP4uxi-Dh7fjGqZ1Ab-sKYKUYvqGcmd8Vd-wqJPq1kvxBXdN0-AxVySC7bfBtlyr2CJse2URqPtxbHvLzDa70dSYtcVB5zqFkIv13MpDF3ylWjfNR_HFZ6etSvF1rY0TVXMKFT7npVYPTzXwc7hASBaUe6uMHlihU4WgEv3Qdj8Q5EG775v_u3ksxAJPQ6dIc8og/3er/f7I3-oRtRD-L46zLQSJzcA/h1/EVD2DgGLUl8o8BoSi2z9W7ribNxihK72ZDibIpI-40c)** | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XjCqXrrLwF4bH2kWsIavZ-IPZevRBtCjk2Ra6lQrkgDlhq1Ngh_4qwcH03UHFib5-brJyeECwQwpQjVLCAjSJno_MK1XYU-HPrxksYnS6zsuv5Q3D8ZXBS0HtKDKZTL27mMlgrsyBQxYH9gpxPciYv6sbclWHrrkk27wq6eEt2TbrushUfSfkYDV6QG7tmQ7uCkbc4L2tg3UqTNKJmhAyAoHXwJOw_SxP4MT6G8ZWR-D92EuYbx8_GOSAh4BPzWol5JhJEr5P6-zv_-8AGXgMPwmUdBLVFQ243uIBi1b_BZ2/3er/f7I3-oRtRD-L46zLQSJzcA/h2/8D54eJ3DpTQ4BgqF8curIBFw7dyrZEpr2tp50hFM-ac)

We wish this weren’t the case, but this won’t be the last time we see a wave of GOP money try to distract voters from the real issues.

**The GOP could spend up to $100 million attacking Tim this election.** It’s not going to be pretty.

Tim was born and raised in Ohio. He’s been in union halls and on picket lines his whole life. He’s tough enough to face these attacks and come out on top -- but he’s gonna need a grassroots team to have his back.

We need to be prepared for anything they throw our way. body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Newsom Cover-Up](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopbu2fEYrkGir-gvCbBvZoEufbhO3t4XaKo3XfSbJmDEg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=1) This morning I joined a family who just lost their home in the River Fire. You can watch our video from the ravaged property [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyEINgUWmM3fVP7XIxLk5gmB7Mz4iHgCjqfU46-ntIQDQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=2). As catastrophic fires rage on, here’s what we know for sure: Gavin Newsom lied about the measures he took to prevent them and is now covering it up. First, he [overstated](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=AqcP3gaATGIScVVA8IpgoHZrM4fUqJxz_xNPjFtZl65Bb-Afo0qv632sWfdD8uUqaTlfbmNjq2N_wo4ZNP4716f79bDlZeK92IwrTpjs_jO0wJ5LAlaipOkQlfN0TA-Z2x7vh4H5ZYkD90BK50vVrI72xzUKT5bPTPI8gKXm7_fII-xpRIOmJASjwoQxiLy8&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=3) his fire prevention efforts by “an astounding 690 percent.” Then his CalFire Chief [removed](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=AqcP3gaATGIScVVA8IpgoHZrM4fUqJxz_xNPjFtZl64yzfS3IT14fuNyid5-YVD-9ebxRAIXeKdPUxQ6kro6J1agFpc-yFVBH3NO5gzMW0Z-aX2P1ULodWjsLUuEy73SZHgZCYVEEganCQwyG7Rm5pLmZtM3tZHenTwoaiE8TgjKIAmZAeRx5M6Mk-Vr27BHjMTGJ5rv-cGqigRViXsDbunx067kbENswlSTH2Pn3-LktDidl8of2WUl8rpEWnWA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=4) the evidence from the internet. Now, an oversight hearing demanded by lawmakers was just [cancelled](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=AqcP3gaATGIScVVA8IpgoHZrM4fUqJxz_xNPjFtZl64yzfS3IT14fuNyid5-YVD-9ebxRAIXeKdPUxQ6kro6J1agFpc-yFVBH3NO5gzMW0Z-aX2P1ULodWjsLUuEy73SZHgZCYVEEganCQwyG7Rm5pLmZtM3tZHenTwoaiE8TgjKIAmZAeRx5M6Mk-Vr27BHjMTGJ5rv-cGqigRViXsDbunx067kbENswlSTH2Pn3-LktDidl8of2WUl8rpEWnWA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=5) – until at least after the Recall. In other news, we've received a major endorsement from Congressman Doug Ose. Doug had to end his own campaign after a heart attack. He's feeling better, and joined me at the Capitol for a [press conference](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6jM0N-2qxT3DPLXSj_6AwNV2dHXxlUm1f2uX96HFTBaeYSHI-bdFzq5DCl8t_NRN7A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=6) covered by state and national media. And tonight is the last televised debate. It will be online at KCRA.com. I’m looking forward to making our closing argument: Gavin Newsom is the poster child for the decline of California. Once that poster is off the wall, we’ll have a fresh canvas. We the People can have any future we choose. [Help keep our ads up through Election Day](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=7) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAy7o3xpoahnGMYmPviw76fPBdMYQAo9YSf32hYstni6jw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_25&n=8) Kevin Kiley

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden gone wild!
body:
Joe Biden is risking abandoning thousands of Americans in Afghanistan because he's afraid of an Islamic terrorist attack if we stay there past his self-imposed "Redline" date of August 31st.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA) Joe Biden is risking abandoning thousands of Americans in Afghanistan because he's afraid of an Islamic terrorist attack if we stay there past his self-imposed "Redline" date of August 31st.

This is insane.
**WE DON 'T FEAR TERRORISTS, THEY FEAR US!**
Or . . . at least that was U.S. policy before Joe Biden occupied the White House.

**The precedent of weakness that Biden is setting will send a signal to every Jihadist around the world that America is ripe for an attack once again.**

[**We have to stop this!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA)

A primary function of Congress is to provide oversight on the Executive Branch.

Democrats spent the last four years during the Trump Administration with CONSTANT, illegitimate hearings, investigations, and TWO politically-motivated impeachments.

With Democrats now controlling both houses of Congress and the White House, we can kiss Congressional oversight goodbye for the next 15 months.

[**Help flip Congress Red by supporting my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA)

There are six days left in the month and we have to raise $22,000 to cover our operating expenses and reserve goals.

[**Can you chip in $22, $44 or $66 right now?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA)

Our situation is way beyond partisan bickering.

**The Biden Regime is risking thousands of American lives, and Democrats in Congress are looking the other way and allowing a policy of weakness to play out.**

Help put an end to this by backing my campaign today.

By flipping Congress Red, we can stop the damage that is being done by Biden, and we can work to quickly reverse it - **but that battle starts WHEN we win!**

[**Donate any amount you can to help us hit our end of month goals and WIN.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9F1dtoxle7QWQWEX892h0eLg/jNb1L9SAs1IOnL7LwaLhXA)

Thank you for your patriotism and for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a39b4dc3f9be409f9d020c802785e7a4&_e=B48K2G0IkruDE6Dtbim_RE8o3DxOeNM9tDW7mz-TtA9OHl1KvuDaPXm_P-zfdqt7Y19MhLesck1m6S17AyiqBg4v_oida-g04D_0zGLp1-cZo4TPRa4OPCo2Vbd83vi_PJA1MjdT9KiGHPDoTN34bBLK3_u9h2MOxdsl69prOML5d3yUoSi21OyJNrFri6tdgwDHfQ8rk_RBcvjJyRxpaNPGU5AVL2mR2sh9YxuCXye9A0sh7FiQPpX6-T6afYTn63KVpednWkHOHg9q8bi0XDyj6QZh_5E_nQYAoCGzOFB63kYvDiynqblOm-KXdMho9AUWu0fbtdHocT7f4oCxZ-OBqBcXVTkEhYvumJpRRWA7pofUzjfB2oQtHf-ucHVpRBktph3O0yONy5qdO3Bu19FsPxZB4Oubes70jzcmFIIO5prXTD8wFTlsxXihqHiIw3Vzh71tcjYPCQijES2HGtmIp2RpoR7OjC7150UXDQzyV9etCqZshfsbB8t89AMR)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a39b4dc3f9be409f9d020c802785e7a4&_e=B48K2G0IkruDE6Dtbim_RE8o3DxOeNM9tDW7mz-TtA9OHl1KvuDaPXm_P-zfdqt7Y19MhLesck1m6S17AyiqBg4v_oida-g04D_0zGLp1-cZo4TPRa4OPCo2Vbd83vi_PJA1MjdT9KiGHPDoTN34bBLK3_u9h2MOxdsl69prOML5d3yUoSi21OyJNrFri6tdgwDHfQ8rk_RBcvjJyRxpaNPGU5AVL2mR2sh9YxuCXye9A0sh7FiQPpX6-T6afYTn63KVpednWkHOHg9q8bi0XDyj6QZh_5E_nQYAoCGzOFDeuiR5M2mlTR__CxPBd_dSfz854GlUIRS6ue3HYLm4-0BbLtSRrAG-_jmMJGwFGkwnlO_Mi76gFZpR-34YhUlVgd7n9H2a1DoaDFAQM9SxpENVQhxh3FlbY24sUBhnW7kSWChYg7SeRrsLn8-AKLRjM2qo_ZGsd2kvpVBe0BFroaJCmzhLp-diFi6gzLsGcUAmLt5U9_ZsEY8r6F0sJHHH)**
