From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a42a46d4a9ff43f0aff09ccb595f9b4e&_e=aTNN7V2LXM12aFJhrAdr8yq2DGcgt0T0RgOekP3xoaJmbVlgfscm2T97q1c0SN_vglnNjXpGvQAqVx7zPd4Izk97HoXKpYrriMglMITlyupIqN_EwdX4L0DLJHp2StFksC09XyefM3vAvjQ3kdfmfPL0J0SdpVyuCOqNak89ZnorM42HGMmiagv_CZWeAGq7e2qR9vFAPY7OR9_NIwDjQJelZ3VhW7V8ViX3ykUvIMYKXDN103GX0HA26bCPuorxygFNfnw8cwJT_a79W4niyrAQcNL4h7HD6o5VmG9gs4M6hM65abU9zPQiiPD4cZG1KBpDpOoPOUaTOKQ7KR9e4Pmd0k9_fyG-sXTG7uRrXpZfyNeSua-rb31le8Rys1YDnTOghxC6C-DhQWkoKzLwOy4vxCCjyqVZv0x2bBtIChHqz3qXOxebbng3vgwxU8yPWoqQUYKr9JnXU16Svcx5gABy9DHGNr8TXm0FI8IDtcMN10_fJI2A1AJeBQ0a_vnW)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a42a46d4a9ff43f0aff09ccb595f9b4e&_e=aTNN7V2LXM12aFJhrAdr8yq2DGcgt0T0RgOekP3xoaJmbVlgfscm2T97q1c0SN_vglnNjXpGvQAqVx7zPd4Izk97HoXKpYrriMglMITlyupIqN_EwdX4L0DLJHp2StFksC09XyefM3vAvjQ3kdfmfPL0J0SdpVyuCOqNak89ZnorM42HGMmiagv_CZWeAGq7e2qR9vFAPY7OR9_NIwDjQJelZ3VhW7V8ViX3ykUvIMYKXDN103GX0HA26bCPuorxygFNfnw8cwJT_a79W4niyrAQcNL4h7HD6o5VmG9gs4MA5c9R3G0fCQ8x17JYOWOX67uDJwm_eREX6vRgTMOTxsjPnTEPj-UTZhceEhhqJxgcMusu4l9PJjzRzu8lpNFcmrt9eDnTrsJteNMsbglcKYa_S4UsASOedE1jSmAvxn13qP8Mu6pXg3RhCI6kVSD17oXT13i08pf_vvTWEpAP1fIifjGhCN542ipCEOLoJlbLQ_kPECNOPmfqUh0UNqgj)**

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Quick survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In a people-powered movement like ours, we need to hear from you about the issues impacting you most.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210825-2374-header&t=1&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)
On a grassroots campaign like ours, it's crucial for our team to hear from all of you as often as possible to learn about the issues that you care about and that are impacting you and your family.
Knowing what’s important to you helps us fight for legislation in Congress that will support working people most.
These periodic surveys we send also allow us to see how priorities have shifted in the past couple months. Last time we checked in, most people said abolishing the filibuster and protecting voting rights were their top concerns.
[Will you take one minute to share your thoughts with us? We’re eager to hear your priorities and what issues are most pressing to you at this moment.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/august-priorities-survey/?source=em20210825-2374-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=2&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)
**[Take Our Survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/august-priorities-survey/?source=em20210825-2374-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=3&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)**
Listening to all of you is how Alexandria and our team determine many of our legislative priorities in Congress. For example, when Alexandria learned about the extreme burden of funeral costs that families were facing on top of other pandemic hardships – she got to work fighting for funeral assistance for families, and won $2 billion in emergency relief.
[**Will you take a minute to complete the survey? It’s quick and will give us a sense of what’s most important to you right now as we fight for legislation to improve the lives of working families.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/august-priorities-survey/?source=em20210825-2374-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=4&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)
Thank you for your participation. We’re looking forward to reading your input and seeing the results.
All the best,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210825-2374-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=5&refcode2=2374_2526796_CDTCuJ&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210825-2374-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=6&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2374%2E2526796%2ECDTCuJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: A congresswoman just threatened me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fc78d3f0c81b4c6a9e657d43687ed8f8&_e=LEXnnq1JTcA1AeUehbEOAgVGL17AW2OfHQkY3FSdC-fwZYiboBNxM41bQOCXVOnC7up9amZmaawLjBaxsINMOLsD33tXYZ7iX5NhNcFJxCUrVy8CA2CpOA9deb4gpybpSRdKd87qIyHDC5Qwr30EGTI0ZJo8tRWSzn0ZPhn2F4OSzwu9p9shH3N36JSRYsSKDvRZIR9lHBSGikAemf_vbAf-HWnlY3YrMUeBHgYhBAAtUs4jcEDE72xMwJLa8dM77dlyGB4x4_VimLgrK-1oIznxJ5V_iSAiHJyrCS0LS7t_e4eiTSuFb_0mioGCqP_nh4BfRkZ9rIzG5f1J62vftEyu8XuNtQ0oce3MiilQV4w_Qu6B-0t5KdJN6j40lhsxKjmkSV6T27i1wyVi_JYKRgY6PuqEybAc6bpAskNF4i0lueMcPESFYOl5qRpCmprgPSAS3j3lB6Us2tGMgZOzOsuWesScbTJS2A0OIPXaHKMZPDXKLZiUyXA-HwjYbLRxx09pz4BqnHamuhlLo46sCiZ7lehlAln0smGo8qqQB99Bf8PGTxr0nwmhhofQd9J2dx20CbX2UBWpf8hn12W1GP4M-skiapKtZr1aoZuI1Po%3D)
---

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fc78d3f0c81b4c6a9e657d43687ed8f8&_e=LEXnnq1JTcA1AeUehbEOAgVGL17AW2OfHQkY3FSdC-fwZYiboBNxM41bQOCXVOnC7up9amZmaawLjBaxsINMOLsD33tXYZ7iX5NhNcFJxCUrVy8CA2CpOA9deb4gpybpSRdKd87qIyHDC5Qwr30EGTI0ZJo8tRWSzn0ZPhn2F4OSzwu9p9shH3N36JSRYsSKDvRZIR9lHBSGikAemf_vbAf-HWnlY3YrMUeBHgYhBAAtUs4jcEDE72xMwJLa8dM77dlyGB4x4_VimLgrK-1oIznxJ5V_iSAiHJyrCS0LS7t_e4eiTSuFb_0mioGCqP_nh4BfRkZ9rIzG5f1J62vftEyu8XuNtQ0oce3MiilQV4w_Qu6B-0t5KdJN6j40lhsxKjmkSV6T27i1wyVi_JYKRv6iMMbmGJknrQN-fKuV980XluAng0Wejk7f_NFnWcAHkwsy_ZjtUFraQMjaBFsbhu0PwR1pTHQYoXNTq46cHQ7NoDoFyPsFTCpSANCruYHwxel5bLLFBil8yD5c97l4p6MlD1-4iBWDeUm6gnUDE0K60Zk4Mt6BKO4uWKRvnzl5YDl34wzTDM6HrxJMq88O1FmPb7ys7912gDjzxPRpzYg%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fc78d3f0c81b4c6a9e657d43687ed8f8&_e=LEXnnq1JTcA1AeUehbEOAgVGL17AW2OfHQkY3FSdC-fwZYiboBNxM41bQOCXVOnC7up9amZmaawLjBaxsINMOLsD33tXYZ7iX5NhNcFJxCUrVy8CA2CpOA9deb4gpybpSRdKd87qIyHDC5Qwr30EGTI0ZJo8tRWSzn0ZPhn2F4OSzwu9p9shH3N36JSRYsSKDvRZIR9lHBSGikAemf_vbAf-HWnlY3YrMUeBHgYhBAAtUs4jcEDE72xMwJLa8dM77dlyGB4x4_VimLgrK-1oIznxJ5V_iSAiHJyrCS0LS7t_e4eiTSuFb_0mioGCqP_nh4BfRkZ9rIzG5f1J62vftEyu8XuNtQ0oce3MiilQV4w_Qu6B-0t5KdJN6j40lhsxKjmkSV6T27i1wyVi_JYKRg30bS6to9s-FdSbWfCLiRvWOMRVo8PMY43bKY9xrE41PC9LzA1ykmGjEqyfZGmKz2aYEPtaCS4K_Sunblp1t9ERiVb7XcvOTLAZomwsXM_odt9QIDh4bJOVt1hIRpCDbuJg8a25T5y_tCCC-VkLETFZFCS4drsOFmBBcZoGMJjijR7T8VL8POW0CEJE0zVXOAwNK1U1PlNv-9joS1Q-LP8%3D)
**[I’m calling for an investigation into Cori Bush’s threatening statements against me and my family, and I hope you’ll show your support for action to be taken against extremists who think the rules don’t apply to them.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fc78d3f0c81b4c6a9e657d43687ed8f8&_e=LEXnnq1JTcA1AeUehbEOAgVGL17AW2OfHQkY3FSdC-fwZYiboBNxM41bQOCXVOnC7up9amZmaawLjBaxsINMOLsD33tXYZ7iX5NhNcFJxCUrVy8CA2CpOA9deb4gpybpSRdKd87qIyHDC5Qwr30EGTI0ZJo8tRWSzn0ZPhn2F4OSzwu9p9shH3N36JSRYsSKDvRZIR9lHBSGikAemf_vbAf-HWnlY3YrMUeBHgYhBAAtUs4jcEDE72xMwJLa8dM77dlyGB4x4_VimLgrK-1oIznxJ5V_iSAiHJyrCS0LS7t_e4eiTSuFb_0mioGCqP_nh4BfRkZ9rIzG5f1J62vftEyu8XuNtQ0oce3MiilQV4w_Qu6B-0t5KdJN6j40lhsxKjmkSV6T27i1wyVi_JYKRhmc0Rg7Lipei_uQx1p_Ydm0biz8ifkzfjUm3dMysXzGhxm_fP_k2shfSc7rtDTACsmF7xmrUE9jFngVYru6YoCTl_sK-2tdFCvUqUhUFMevUl9icCt9-HW9od7AgkuBNfymp2T5h33X8vwAxrhvhPp_zhrHGCQ6DtokT-kab_HDWG70oQstTgTrFdU9nAaH82zejdsqJ-B4AJRoc1m-DJQ%3D) **

[ DEMAND A CONGRESSIONAL INVESTIGATION INTO REP. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights.
